names.召唤死亡天使贝达特的影像: Summon an image of Beidat, Archangel of Death
names.召唤憎恨牧者科塔席的影像: Summon an image of K'tash, the Hate Shepherd

desc.以锤类武器重击前方地面，制造出一道向前释放的冲击波，对敌人造成伤害并有较高几率将: The character slams the ground in front of them with a Mace, creating a wave that travels forward and damages enemies with an increased chance to stun.
desc.猛击前方地面，制造出一道向前释放的冲击波，对敌人造成伤害。: Slams the ground in front of you, creating a wave that travels forward and damages enemies.
desc.在身体前方以弧状挥动武器（双持时则挥动两把武器）, 对前方区域的怪物造成伤害。限: The character swings their weapon (or both weapons if dual wielding) in an arc, damaging monsters in an area in front of them. Only works with Axes and Swords.
desc.向一名敌人冲锋，使用盾牌对其猛击并以近战武器顺手打击。此攻击将会击退目标并将其击: Charges at an enemy, bashing it with the character's shield and striking it. This knocks it back and stuns it. Enemies in the way are pushed to the side. Damage and stun are proportional to distance travelled. Cannot be supported by Multistrike.
desc.持续吟唱向目标方向冲锋。撞击路径上的敌人后停止冲锋，对区域内的敌人造成伤害，并对: Channel to charge in the target direction. You will crash into enemies on your path, stopping your charge and dealing damage to enemies in an area, and extra damage to the enemies you collided with. While charging, your Shield is raised and you will Block all incoming Blockable hits.
desc.发出一声战吼，附近有敌人时，提高自身和周围友军的伤害和魔力再生。伤害增加量随着周: Performs a warcry, granting increased damage and mana regeneration to the user and nearby allies if there are nearby enemies. The damage increase is proportional to the number of surrounding enemies. Shares a cooldown with other Warcry skills.
desc.跃向空中，落地时用锤子对敌人造成伤害，并击退敌人。\n被踩到的敌人将被推离。:
Jump into the air, damaging and Knocking Back enemies with your mace where you land. Enemies you would land on are
pushed out of the way.
desc.跃向空中，落地时用武器对敌人造成伤害，并击退敌人。被踩到的敌人将被推离。: Jump into the air, damaging and knocking back enemies with your weapon where you land. Enemies you would land on are pushed out of the way.
desc.变形为燃烧的凶兽，腾跃至空中轰击地面，猛击两次并生成熔岩裂缝。消耗怒火生成更多熔: Shapeshift into a burning monstrosity and leap through the air to crash down upon the earth, Slamming twice and creating Molten Fissures. Consumes Rage to create additional Molten Fissures.
desc.使用近战武器发动两次快速打击。: Performs two fast strikes with a melee weapon.
desc.使用近战武器发动两次快速打击，每次都会召唤出你的影分身持续一段时间，并用相同的方: DNT-UNUSED Performs two fast strikes with a melee weapon, each of which summons a double of you for a duration to continuously attack monsters in this fashion.
desc.该技能的每次攻击都会随机选择一种元素，并只能造成该元素的伤害。若击中敌人，还会在: DNT-UNUSED Each attack with this skill will choose an element at random, and will only be able to deal damage of that element. If the attack hits an enemy, it will also deal damage in an area around them, with the radius being larger if that enemy is suffering from an ailment of the chosen element. It will avoid choosing the same element twice in a row.
Attacks with both weapons, dealing the damage of both in one strike. Dual wield only. Does not work with wands.
desc.在敌人之间穿梭，造成武器伤害。需要匕首、爪类以及单手剑。无法被多重打击辅助。: Dive through enemies, dealing weapon damage. Only works with daggers, claws and one handed swords. Cannot be supported by Multistrike.
desc.进行一次攻击, 若是命中敌人则累积一颗狂怒球. 带着狂怒球的状态下将会增加你的攻: Performs an attack that gives the character a frenzy charge if it hits. Frenzy charges increase your attack speed.
desc.射出一发带有腐蚀效果的箭矢, 对击中的敌人造成额外混沌伤害, 并且产生腐蚀地面。: Fires an arrow which deals chaos damage in an area on impact, and spreads caustic ground. Enemies standing on the caustic ground take chaos damage over time.
desc.发射一支缓慢移动的蛇形箭，在刺穿敌人的同时造成混沌伤害，并在地面留下一道腐蚀之痕: Fires a slow-moving serpentine arrow which deals chaos damage while piercing enemies, and leaves a trail of caustic ground. Enemies standing on the caustic ground take chaos damage over time.
desc.一个匕首专用的技能, 若是在敌人背后施放则会增加伤害且必定暴击. 高魔力消耗及技: A dagger skill that deals a critical strike and additional damage to an enemy if the attack is made from behind the enemy. Has high mana cost and cooldown
desc.使一个灵柩发生剧烈爆炸，对周围的敌人造成伤害。: Cause a Corpse to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.
desc.使一个未使用过的灵柩爆炸， 对附近的敌人造成火焰伤害。 附近未使用过的灵柩也会连: Explodes an unused corpse, dealing fire damage to nearby enemies. Nearby corpses will also explode in a chain reaction. The explosions are not affected by modifiers to spell damage.
desc.传送至一名敌人身边并发起打击。消耗暴击球能额外传送并打击附近的敌人。: Teleport to a enemy and Strike them. Consumes Power Charges to perform additional teleporting Strikes on nearby enemies.
desc.不断传送到敌人身边并攻击它们，对其施加割伤但不造成伤害。传送结束后，每个敌人受到: Repeatedly teleports to enemies and hits them, inflicting a wound but dealing no damage. After the repeating finishes, each enemy is hit by the total damage of their wounds, which are removed.
desc.增加一个持续造成物理伤害的增益效果，同时提高攻击速度和生命偷取效果。击败敌人会刷: Adds a buff that deals Physical Damage over time, while increasing Attack Speed and Life Leech. Killing an enemy while this buff is active refreshes the buff duration, and can grant a Frenzy Charge.
Fires multiple arrows at different targets.
desc.在目标区域创造一股急促的寒流，并对敌人造成伤害。此攻击还会创造一片开散的冰缓地面: Creates a sudden burst of cold in a targeted area, damaging enemies. This also creates an expanding area which is filled with chilled ground, and deals cold damage over time to enemies. Enemies that die while in the area have a chance to grant Frenzy Charges. The cooldown can be bypassed by expending a Frenzy Charge.
desc.在你身边创造一股急促的寒流，并对敌人造成伤害。此攻击还会在你身边创造一片开散的冰: Creates a sudden burst of cold around you, damaging enemies. This also creates a chilling area around you which expands and deals cold damage over time to surrounding enemies in addition to chilling them. Enemies that die while in the area grant Frenzy Charges, and you will passively gain Frenzy Charges while there are enemies in the area.
desc.向四面八方召唤寒冰波，根据敌人与你的距离将其击退。对寒冰弹投射物附近施放寒冰新星: Conjure a wave of ice in all directions, Knocking Back enemies based on how close they are to you. Casting Ice Nova targeting near a Frostbolt Projectile will cause it to originate from the Frostbolt instead of you. Consumes a Cold Infusion if possible to leave a patch of Chilled Ground.
desc.向目标发射一束燃烧的投射物。投射物在击中时爆炸，对小范围的敌人造成伤害。: Launch a fiery Projectile towards a target. The Projectile explodes on impact, damaging foes in a small area.
desc.以施法者为中心，螺旋发射一连串火球。: Launches a series of fireballs in a spiral around the caster.
desc.激活时，受到闪电伤害会为你积蓄充能。充满时释放全部充能来触发此技能，产生一道连锁: While active, taking Lightning damage builds up charge on you. Reaching full charge expends all charge to Trigger this skill, creating a Chaining lightning bolt that arcs to nearby enemies.
desc.一道闪电之弧从施放者射向目标，并连锁弹射到附近的敌人身上。击中感电敌人会释放伤害: An arc of Lightning stretches from the caster to a targeted enemy and Chains on to other nearby enemies. Shocked enemies Hit release damaging pulses.
desc.一道电弧从施放者射向目标, 并会弹跳至周围其他敌人。每次主电弧弹射时，也会向第二: A shocking arc of lightning stretches from the caster to a targeted enemy and chains to other nearby enemies. Each time the beam chains it will also chain simultaneously to a second enemy, but no enemy can be hit twice by the beams. Also grants a buff making you lucky when damaging enemies with Arc for a short duration.
desc.消耗一个灵柩或暴击球产生一个短暂存活的魔卫。消耗暴击球所产生的魔卫会得到强化，并: Consume a Corpse or Power Charge to create a short-lived Zombie. Zombies created from Power Charges are Empowered and also create two additional non-empowered Zombies.
desc.以魔法之火快速的燃烧自己及周围的敌人. 在此效果下, 你的法术伤害大幅增加. 当: Engulfs you in magical fire that rapidly burns you and nearby enemies. Your spell damage is substantially increased while under this effect. The effect ends when you have 1 life remaining.
desc.牺牲部分生命和能量护盾，以魔法烈焰笼罩自身，使周围敌人迅猛燃烧一段时间。该效果可: Sacrifices a portion of your Life and Energy Shield to engulf you in magical fire that rapidly burns nearby enemies for a duration. Your spell damage is increased while under this effect.
desc.基于你的武器，投出剧毒的投射物，连锁打击敌人。: Fires a poisonous projectile based on your weapon that will chain between enemies.
desc.发射一束喷射火花的投射物，投射物会沿着地面不规则移动，直到击中一个敌人或失效。尽: Launch a spray of sparking Projectiles that travel erratically along the ground until they hit an enemy or expire. Consumes a Cold Infusion if possible to fire many sparks in a circle.
Continuously launches unpredictable sparks in all directions that move randomly until they hit an enemy or expire.
desc.凝聚冰之碎片为矛并向前射出, 此冰矛将会穿透附近的敌人, 并对一定距离以外的敌人: Launches shards of ice in rapid succession. After travelling a short distance they change to a second form, which moves much faster and pierces through enemies.
desc.召唤束缚怪物的灵魂作为一个可复活的召唤生物。: Summon the spirit of the bound monster as a Reviving Minion.
desc.用武器攻击敌人，施加一个有层数的主减益效果，并对击中的其它敌人附加一个不带层数的: Attacks with your weapon, applying a charged debuff to enemies hit by your strike, and an uncharged debuff to any other enemies hit. Upon reaching 6 charges, expiring, or the enemy's death, the charged debuff is removed, and it deals damage to that and other nearby enemies. Enemies with either debuff explode when they die, damaging other nearby enemies. Damage from this explosion cannot be reflected.
desc.凝聚冰霜之力，转换一部分的物理伤害为冰霜伤害以重击敌人。若受到攻击的敌人被冻结且: Hits enemies, converting some of your physical damage to cold damage. If an enemy is frozen and is on less than one third life, they will shatter when hit by Glacial Hammer. If striking three times in a row, the third strike will freeze enemies more easily.
desc.聚集空气中的水分, 制造一堵能阻挡敌人行动的冰墙. 在冰墙成形位置的敌人将会受到: Creates a wall of ice which holds back enemies. Targets under the wall are damaged and pushed back.
desc.制造一堵能阻挡敌人的冰晶之墙，冰晶受到足量伤害或遭到大力推挤时会爆炸，对周围的敌: Create a wall of Ice Crystals which holds back enemies. The Crystals explode if sufficiently damaged, or if pushed hard enough, damaging nearby enemies. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to add another Lightning explosion if destroyed.
desc.发出一个半月形的寒冰投射物, 被击中的敌人将有几率被冰冻. 这个投射物很快就会消: An icy projectile which has a chance to freeze enemies it passes through. The projectile fades quickly, reducing damage and freezing chance until it dissipates.
desc.击中敌人，将部分物理伤害转化为混沌伤害，并使敌人中毒。该技能受技能持续时间词缀影: Hits enemies, converting some of your physical damage to chaos damage and inflicting poison which will be affected by modifiers to skill duration. If dual wielding, will strike with both weapons.
desc.射出一发带着引线充满爆炸能量的箭矢. 当被命中的目标死亡或是引线烧完, 该箭矢将: Fires an arrow which acts as a short duration fuse. Applying additional arrows to an enemy extends the duration. When the target dies or the fuses expire, the arrows explode, dealing fire AoE damage to nearby enemies. The AoE radius is proportional to the number of arrows upon death.
desc.对一片区域内的所有敌人降下诅咒，使他们减速，并使他们身上的效果消减得更慢。: Curse all enemies in an area, Slowing them and making other effects on them expire more slowly.
desc.在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下诅咒，降低其元素抗性。: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their Elemental Resistances.
desc.在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下诅咒，使他们造成的伤害降低。: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, making them deal less damage.
desc.为一个目标添加印记。其受到的下一次暴击会激活印记，消耗其以造成额外伤害，并使你获: Mark a target. The next Critical Hit the target receives Activates the Mark, Consuming it to deal extra damage and grant you a Frenzy Charge.
desc.在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下诅咒，使他们受到的击中忽略一部分的护甲。: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay. making Hits against them ignore a portion of their Armour.
desc.对区域内的所有目标施加一个减益状态，其承受的部分击中伤害会被减益状态追踪。减益状: Debuff all targets in an area, causing a portion of Damage they take from Hits to be tracked by the Debuff. When the debuff's duration expires or can kill the target, the target loses life equal to that tracked damage all at once.
desc.锁定一名敌人，如果其生命值低于终结阈值，则传送到目标体内，令其产生剧烈爆炸；否则: Target an enemy to either teleport inside the target's body if they are under the Cull threshold, causing it to violently explode, or to apply a Debuff to them, which will cause the same effect if that enemy falls under the Cull threshold during its duration. Can also be used on Ball Lightning Projectiles. On teleport, the target is destroyed, and the explosion deals Lightning damage to surrounding enemies. If targeting an enemy, the explosion also creates Shocked Ground. Creates a Lightning Infusion on successful use. Highlights enemies that can be Culled.

Target an enemy to either teleport inside the target's body if they are under the Cull threshold, causing it to violently explode, or to apply a Debuff to them, which will cause the same effect if that enemy falls under the Cull threshold during its duration. On teleport, the target is destroyed, and the explosion deals Physical damage to surrounding enemies and inflicts Impale.
desc.在目标地点召唤魔侍武士。它们使用近战攻击，并在持续时间结束后消失。在侵略状态下，: Summon Skeleton Warrior minions at the targeted location. They use a melee attack and die after a duration. If made aggressive, Skeleton Warriors will also dash towards nearby enemies.
desc.一次强力打击，击退敌人并削弱护甲。: Strike with a forceful blow, knocking enemies back and weakening their Armour.
desc.近战攻击敌人，在短期内施加一个减益效果。如果非传奇敌人被该效果击败，则会消耗它的: Attacks enemies with a melee strike, applying a debuff for a short duration. If a non-unique enemy dies while affected by the debuff, the enemy's corpse will be consumed and a Sentinel of Dominance with the same rarity, prefix and suffix modifiers will be summoned for a longer secondary duration.
desc.向空中射出无数箭矢，在短暂延迟后降落在目标周围的区域。使用时消耗狂怒球可以射出额: Fires a large number of arrows into the air, to land in an area around the target after a short delay. Consumes a Frenzy Charge on use to fire additional arrows.
desc.向空中射出多支箭矢，飞行一段时间后陆续抵达，先发射至一个指定位置，抵达后向四面八: Fires multiple arrows into the air, to land in sequence after a delay, starting at the targeted location and spreading outwards in all directions. Each arrow deals damage in an area around it. Half of the arrows will land directly on targets if there are targets in their range.
desc.在目标区域降下燃烧箭雨。可以消耗全部三种元素灌注，火焰灌注时效果范围大幅扩大，闪: Rain a storm of flaming bolts over the targeted area. Can Consume all three types of Elemental Infusion, creating a much larger storm when Fire-Infused, causing lightning bolts when Lightning-Infused, and raining ice bolts when Cold-Infused.
desc.固定数量的火焰之箭呈螺旋状落下，并最终击中目标位置。它们在落地时会产生爆炸，对附: A fixed number of flaming bolts rain down in a spiral, culminating in the central one impacting the targeted location. They explode when landing, dealing damage to nearby enemies and leaving burning ground, which deals fire damage over time.
desc.对目标区域召唤一阵冷冽箭雨。消耗你面前的敌人受到的冰缓和冰冻效果，将其化作冰风暴: Conjure a hail of icy bolts over the targeted area. Chill and Freeze on enemies in front of you are Consumed to fuel the Icestorm by creating improved bolts.
desc.凝聚闪电之力，将近战武器的部分物理伤害转化为闪电伤害重击敌人。充盈的闪电之力在击: Infuses your melee weapon with electrical energies as you swing. In addition to converting some of your physical damage to lightning damage, the stored energy is released from the weapon as projectiles as you strike, flying out to hit farther-away enemies. The projectiles cannot miss if the melee attack hits a target.
desc.凝聚闪电之力, 转换一部分的物理伤害为闪电伤害以重击目标. 闪电之力在击中敌人后: DNT-UNUSED Infuses your melee weapon with electrical energies as you swing. In addition to converting some of your physical damage to lightning damage, the stored energy becomes an orb attached to the enemy you hit, or the ground if you don't hit an enemy. The orb will periodically fire projectiles at other nearby enemies for a duration, which will also damage the enemy the orb is attached to.
desc.以暴风之力强化你的盾牌，使你格挡时对攻击你的敌人造成闪电伤害。: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.
desc.召唤炽热的火焰之盾, 在一定时间内提供额外的护甲. 当格挡或是护甲所累积受到的物: Summons fiery elemental shields providing additional armour for a short duration. If cumulative physical damage prevented by your blocking or armour reaches a threshold, the shields explode outwards, dealing fire damage to surrounding enemies.
desc.施加一个增益效果，增加护甲值，并在耗尽前替你承担部分伤害。当该增益效果时间结束或: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. When the buff expires or is depleted, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken from the buff. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
desc.施加一个增益效果，提升护甲值，并在耗尽前替你承担部分伤害。该技能每秒都会向周围敌: Applies a buff that raises your armour, and takes some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Each second, the skill deals reflected damage to surrounding enemies based on the damage taken by the buff in that second. When the buff is removed, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken by the buff. You cannot have the buff at the same time as any other Guard skill.
desc.尝试吸取一名敌人的力量。标亮处于终结区间内的敌人，在击中时立即将其击败，并获得一: Attempt to rip the lifeforce from an enemy. Enemies within Culling range will be highlighted and instantly killed on Hit, granting a Power Charge. Can only target Enemies in Culling range.
desc.洞穿敌人，施加一个流血减益效果。该效果受技能持续时间属性影响。流血的敌人在移动时: Punctures enemies, causing a bleeding debuff, which will be affected by modifiers to skill duration. Puncture works with bows, daggers, claws or swords.
desc.向目标射出一支箭矢。击中一个敌人或墙壁时，箭矢将对周围的敌人发射连锁闪电光束。: Fire a charged arrow at the target. On hitting an enemy or wall, the arrow will fire Chaining Lightning beams at nearby enemies.
desc.射出带电的箭矢，箭矢会重复飞行一小段时间再改变方向。当箭矢击中敌人时，会生产一道: Fires charged arrows, which repeatedly travel for a short time before changing direction. When they hit enemies, they are struck by a bolt of lightning which damages a number of surrounding enemies.
Casts an aura that increases the movement speed, attack speed and cast speed of you and your allies.
desc.施放一个光环, 为你和友军提供元素抗性，并免疫元素异常状态。: Casts an aura that grants elemental resistances and elemental ailment immunity to you and your allies.
Casts an aura that grants life regeneration to you and your allies.
desc.释放一个光环，使你和在场的友军获得额外的能量护盾总值。: Emit an Aura that grants you and Allies in your Presence additional Total Energy Shield.
desc.施放一个光环，使你与受光环影响友军获得命中和暴击率。: Casts an aura that grants accuracy and critical strike chance to you and your allies.
Casts an aura that grants evasion to you and your allies.
Casts an aura that grants armour to you and your allies.
Casts an aura that adds fire damage to the attacks and spells of you and your allies.
Casts an aura that grants extra cold damage based on physical damage to you and your allies.
desc.施放一个光环, 使你与受光环影响友军在攻击时额外附带闪电伤害, 并且造成更多法术: Casts an aura that adds lightning damage to the attacks of you and your allies, and makes your spells deal more lightning damage.
desc.发射一枚燃烧箭矢造成火焰伤害，并有几率点燃敌人。: Fires a burning arrow that deals fire damage and has a chance to ignite.
desc.射出一发带有火焰能量的箭矢, 接触到敌人时会爆炸, 并对其与周围的敌人造成额外火: Fires an arrow that explodes, dealing fire damage to its target and other nearby enemies, with an increased chance of igniting them.
Casts an aura that grants mana regeneration to you and your allies.
desc.投掷一个陷阱，该陷阱被触发时会爆炸并对周围的敌人造成火焰伤害，且该区域的地面会持: Throws a trap that explodes when triggered, dealing fire damage to surrounding enemies and leaving an area of burning ground that damages enemies who walk through it.
desc.投掷多个陷阱, 陷阱被触发时会爆炸并对周围的敌人造成火焰伤害, 且该区域的地面会: Throws multiple traps that explode when triggered, dealing fire damage to surrounding enemies and leaving areas of burning ground that damages enemies who walk through them.
desc.向前依弧形射出数支匕首，对敌人造成物理伤害。: Fire an arc of knives in front of the caster which deals physical damage.
desc.射出一支冰箭，击中目标后在锥形范围内射出冰屑。: Fire an icy arrow that sprays a cone of ice shards when it hits a target.
desc.发射一支箭矢，将目标身上的部分物理伤害转化为冰霜伤害，并将目标身后锥形区域内的所: Fires an arrow that converts some physical damage to cold on its target and converts all physical damage to cold in a cone behind that target. When you use this skill, it summons a squad of Mirage Sharpshooters for a duration. Cannot be used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
desc.射出一个寒冰投射物, 在接触到敌人时会爆炸, 对该范围敌人造成伤害，使附近地面结: Fire an icy projectile that bursts on impact or when reaching the targeted area, dealing area damage and creating a chilling area that deals cold damage over time. This area will creep across the ground towards nearby enemies until its duration expires.
desc.在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下诅咒，降低其火焰抗性。: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their Fire Resistance.
desc.在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下诅咒，降低其冰霜抗性。: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their Cold Resistance.
desc.在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下诅咒，降低其闪电抗性。: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their Lightning Resistance.
desc.发射一个缓慢移动并可以穿过敌人的投射物。投射物本身无法击中敌人，但会向周围的敌人: Fire a slow-moving Projectile that moves through enemies. The Projectile itself does not Hit enemies, but repeatedly discharges bolts of Lightning at nearby enemies. Consumes a Fire Infusion if possible to slow down over time, create Ignited Ground as it travels, and explode dealing Fire damage in an Area after it dissipates.
desc.DNT-未使用 持续从手中发出烈焰洪流，反复对敌人造成伤害。你吟唱此法术时间越长: DNT-UNUSED Continuously launches a torrent of fire from your hand, repeatedly damaging enemies. As you channel this spell longer, the flames spread wider close to you and spread longer directly in front of you. When you stop channelling you release a wave of fire damage over a wide and long area that will apply a powerful Ignite.
desc.以自体为中心在原地进行旋转攻击，周围的敌人将会被拉向你并受到伤害。使用此技能时，: Spin and attack in place, damaging nearby enemies and pulling others towards you. While using this skill, you cannot be stunned or knocked back. Cannot be supported by Ruthless.
desc.持续吟唱该技能，向指定地点旋转移动。持续吟唱该技能时，你无法被击退。: Channel this skill to move towards a targeted location while spinning. While channelling this skill, you cannot be knocked back.
desc.攻击前方一小片区域。击中敌人的每道冲击波都会积累阶段，只要短期内没有击中任何目标: DNT-UNUSED Attacks a small area in front of you. Each Reave that hits an enemy grants stages, which you will begin to lose after a short period without hitting anything. Only works with Daggers, Claws, and One-Handed Swords.
desc.攻击不同方向的大片区域。击中敌人的每道瓦尔冲击波都会积累阶段，只要短期内没有击中: DNT-UNUSED Repeatedly attacks a large area in different directions. Each Vaal Reave that hits an enemy grants stages, which you will begin to lose after a short period without hitting anything. Only works with Daggers, Claws, and One-Handed Swords.
desc.投掷一个地雷，当它引爆时将你传送至该地雷所在处。当传送时，在原本位置与地雷所在位: Throws a mine that will teleport you to it when detonated. It covers both your escape and arrival with a cloud of smoke that blinds enemies, and gives you a temporary buff to movement speed. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
desc.复制手中的近战武器，并将此灵体投掷出去。此灵体将会向外飞出并如同回力镖一般回到你: Throws a spectral copy of your melee weapon. It flies out and then returns to you, in a spinning attack that damages enemies in its path.
desc.使用念能力复制一把手中的近战武器, 并将此灵体投掷出去. 此灵体将会以你为圆心螺: Throws a spectral copy of your melee weapon. It spirals out in a spinning attack that strikes enemies in its path.
desc.释放一个光环，提高你和在场的友军的火焰抗性。: Emit an Aura that boosts the Fire Resistance of you and Allies in your Presence.
desc.释放一个光环，提高你和在场的友军的冰霜抗性。: Emit an Aura that boosts the Cold Resistance of you and Allies in your Presence.
desc.释放一个光环，提高你和在场的友军的闪电抗性。: Emit an Aura that boosts the Lightning Resistance of you and Allies in your Presence.
desc.释放一个光环，提高你和在场的友军的混沌抗性。: Emit an Aura that boosts the Chaos Resistance of you and Allies in your Presence.
desc.在目标区域设置一个标记. 经过一小段时间后, 闪电会攻击那个标记, 并对该标记周: Sets a marker at a location. After a short duration, lightning strikes the marker, dealing damage around it. When this happens, it will also set off the lightning at any other markers you've cast.
desc.在目标区域设置一个标记. 当标记存在时, 闪电将会随机攻击标记附近的敌人, 对其: Sets a marker at a location. Lightning strikes random enemies around the marker repeatedly over the skill's duration, dealing damage in an area around the strike. Modifiers to the skill's duration will also affect the delay between these strikes. When the duration ends, a large bolt of lightning strikes the marker, dealing damage around it.
desc.可蓄力（持续施放）来施放大型的爆炸. 蓄力的时间越长, 爆炸的范围与造成的伤害越: Channels to build up a large explosion. The longer you channel, the larger the area of effect and damage of the explosion. The explosion occurs after using another skill or after a short period without casting.
desc.持续吟唱，在你周围积蓄毁灭能量。释放能量会引发一次毁灭性爆炸，吟唱时间越久范围越: Channel to build destructive energy around you. Releasing the energy causes a devastating explosion that is larger and more intense the longer you Channelled for.
desc.吟唱该技能会不断保留生命，为你身下的印记灌注力量。施放印记会根据保留的生命量造成: Channel this skill to reserve more and more of your life, building up power in a marker on the ground under you. Release to deal physical damage in an area based on how much life you reserved. Cannot be cast by Totems.
desc.指定一片区域，根据施法速度在其中叠加层数。每 3 层爆炸一次，最多叠满 15 层: Targets an area and builds up stages in that area based on cast speed. It explodes every 3 stages, until it reaches a maximum of 15. As it gains more stages, the area gets smaller but the damage gets higher.
Targets an area and builds up a large explosion. The build-up speed is based on cast speed. The explosion occurs after it reaches 10 stacks.
desc.同时在你所在位置和目标地点产生印记，它们根据施法速度生长，随后爆炸，造成火焰伤害: Creates markers at your location and a targeted location, which grow over time based on cast speed, then explode, dealing fire damage. Cannot be supported by Spell Cascade.
desc.在短暂的准备之后，你使用远程武器进行重复的攻击，这个攻击会稍微随机散射，限定弓与: After a short preparation time, you attack repeatedly with a ranged weapon. These attacks have a small randomised spread. Only works with Bows and Wands. This skill cannot be Triggered.
desc.准备好一排箭或战矛，强化你的下一次可重复的弓箭或战矛投射物攻击，使其可以重复多次: Ready a volley of arrows or spears, Empowering your next Repeatable Bow or Projectile Spear Attack to Repeat multiple times. Consumes your Frenzy Charges on use to add additional repeats.
desc.召唤只能存在极短时间的燃焰骷髅，冲至敌人身边并快速的进行攻击。敌方生物将不会主动: Summons a short-lived flaming skull that rushes at nearby enemies and attacks them rapidly. Enemies will not directly engage these spirits, and can pass through them.
desc.用汹涌的火焰打击前方的敌人。燃烧的敌人会受到更高伤害。如击中被点燃的敌人，则会在: Strikes enemies in front of you with a surge of flame. Burning enemies are dealt more damage. If you hit an ignited enemy, will create burning ground under them. Your damage modifiers don't apply to this burning ground.
Desecrates the ground, summoning corpses and dealing chaos damage to all enemies in the area. The corpses will be chosen from the monsters in the current area and any Spectres that have existed in this instance.
desc.将一个魔侍挂上尖刺，尖刺存在时为你的召唤生物施加护盾减少受到击中的伤害。受到一次: Impale a Skeleton on a bone spike to shield your Minions while the spike remains, reducing the amount of damage taken from Hits. Taking a Hit that deals damage above a certain threshold will cause that Minion's shield to absorb all damage from that Hit, then explode.  The bone spike is itself a Minion, and shields itself. If it dies, shields on your other Minions disappear.
Icicles emerge from the ground in a series of small bursts, each damaging enemies caught in the area.
Lightning crackles in a series of small bursts, each damaging enemies caught in the area.
desc.给武器灌注熔岩之力，对敌人造成物理及火焰伤害，并从击中的敌人身上发射出熔岩球，射: Infuses your melee weapon with molten energies to attack with physical and fire damage. This attack causes balls of molten magma to launch forth from the enemies you hit, divided amongst all enemies hit by the strike. These will deal area attack damage to enemies where they land.
desc.给武器灌注熔岩之力，对敌人造成物理及火焰伤害。此攻击会向前发射熔岩火球，着地时对: Infuses your melee weapon with molten energies to attack with physical and fire damage. This attack causes balls of molten magma to launch forth causing area attack damage to enemies where they land.
desc.朝空中射出一支箭矢，在落点扇起一阵龙卷风，持续造成物理伤害，并缓速其中的敌人。射: Fire a skyward shot that whips up a Tornado where it lands, dealing Physical damage over time and Hindering enemies standing in it. Arrows, thrown Spears and Crossbow bolts fired at the Tornado are sucked into it, causing the Tornado to spit out a ring of copied Projectiles. Copied Projectiles cannot be copied again, even by further Tornados.
desc.激活时，受到你的非捷技能攻击造成的足量溢出伤害的敌人会产生爆炸，并根据造成的溢出: While active, enemies you sufficiently Overkill with non-Herald Attacks will cause an explosion that Ignites nearby enemies based on the Overkill damage dealt.
desc.激活时，非捷技能攻击击中并击碎一名敌人会产生冰霜爆炸，对周围的敌人造成攻击伤害。: While active, Shattering an enemy with a non-Herald Attack Hit will cause an icy explosion that deals Attack damage to surrounding enemies.
desc.激活时，非捷技能攻击击中并击败感电敌人会使后续的攻击击中释放出闪电，对周围所有的: While active, killing Shocked enemies with a non-Herald Attack Hit will cause subsequent Attack Hits to release lightning bolts which deals Attack damage to all surrounding enemies.
desc.获得一个增益效果，使你造成更多物理伤害。在该效果下击败敌人后，该技能会召唤一个【: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage. When you kill an enemy while you have this buff, this skill will summon a Sentinel of Purity, or refresh the duration and life of an existing one instead if you have the maximum number of them. The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.
desc.在你的周围产生一片奉献地面。: Create an area of Consecrated Ground around you.
desc.产生一片奉献地面，为你和友军提供生命再生效果，并降低你们身上的诅咒效果。: Creates an area of Consecrated Ground, providing life regeneration and reducing the effect of curses for you and allies who stand in it.
desc.DNT-未使用 汇聚雷霆之力并从手中快速的释放多次闪电, 对你面前弧状区域内的所: DNT-UNUSED While you channel this skill, it releases pulses of electrical energy, dealing lightning damage in a semicircular area in front of you.
Generic monster mortar skill. Like Monster Projectile but has an impact effect.
Fires a projectile from a Wand that causes a series of small explosions surrounding its point of impact, each damaging enemies caught in the area.
desc.召唤混沌魔像, 启动时会使你获得物理伤害减伤. 混沌魔像会施放一个造成持续伤害的: Summons a Chaos Golem that grants you Physical Damage Reduction. The Chaos Golem can use a damage over time Chaos aura and a cascade of Chaos spikes in addition to its melee attack.
desc.召唤寒冰魔像, 启动时会使你提高暴击和命中. 寒冰魔像会施放寒冰弹幕并在近战攻击: Summons an Ice Golem that grants you increased Critical Strike Chance and Accuracy. The Ice Golem can use an icy barrage spell and a chilling spinning dash in addition to its melee attack.
desc.召唤烈焰魔像, 启动时会使你增加伤害. 烈焰魔像会使用火焰放射, 持续造成火焰伤: Summons a Flame Golem that grants you increased Damage. The Flame Golem can use a fire spray, a wave of fire damage, and an explosive arcing projectile.
desc.重击地面，对范围内的敌人造成三段冲击伤害。敌人受到的第二段和第三段伤害的伤害较低: Slam the ground, damaging enemies in an area around the impact in three stages. Enemies take slightly less damage on the second and third stage.
desc.释放造成闪电伤害的新星，对敌人造成触电。离你较近的敌人不会受到伤害，新星边缘的敌: Unleash a Nova of Lightning damage to Electrocute enemies. Enemies close to you take no damage while enemies at the edge of the ring take significantly more damage. Enemies Hit can be Electrocuted by all Lightning damage for a short duration.
desc.传送到指定地点，对敌人造成伤害并在路线上造成燃烧。和其它闪现技能共用冷却时间。: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving a trail of burning ground in your wake. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
desc.对敌人发起奋力一击，同时获得降低击中伤害的护体状态。消耗耐力球可以规避其冷却时间: Attacks enemies with a powerful melee strike which grants Fortification, reducing damage you take from hits. The cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.
desc.增加攻击范围。从击中的第一个敌人处释放冰霜之刃射向其他敌人。: Attack enemies with increased range, releasing icy blades from the first enemy hit which fly at other enemies.
desc.跃向空中，落地时用武器对敌人造成伤害，并击退部分敌人。被踩到的敌人将被推离。: Jump into the air, damaging enemies (and knocking back some) with your weapon where you land. Enemies you would land on are pushed out of the way.
desc.变形为双足飞龙，并投掷岩浆球，触地时造成范围伤害。该技能可连锁弹射，向前方多次造: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and lob a ball of magma that deals area damage as it hits the ground. The skill Chains, bouncing forward to deal damage multiple times. Impacts on Molten Fissures or Volcanos will activate them as though they were Slammed.
desc.\r\n投掷炽热法球，触地时造成范围伤害。该技能可连锁弹射，向前方多次造成伤害。: Lob a fiery orb that deals area damage as it hits the ground. The skill Chains, bouncing forward to deal damage multiple times. The number of  Chains is refreshed when passing through a Flame Wall.
desc.诅咒一片区域的所有目标，使它们击中敌人会获得疲惫状态，并使它们在濒血时受到更多伤: Curses all targets in an area, causing them to be debilitated when they hit enemies and increasing damage they take while on low life.
desc.立即将你包裹在坚冰之中，它在一定时间内保护你，或者直到你受到一定次数的攻击，施法: Immediately encases you in ice, protecting you for a duration or until you take damage from a number of hits, and also grants a buff once the cast time has finished. You cannot move or perform non-instant actions while in the ice. When the ice breaks, the buff is also removed.
desc.使用近战武器打击敌人，将物理伤害转换为随机的元素伤害。根据转换成的元素释放出猛烈: Your melee weapon strikes enemies, converting physical damage to a random element. Then, depending on the element chosen, it releases a fiery explosion, an arcing bolt of lightning, or an icy wave. It will avoid choosing the same element twice in a row.
Like monster mortar skill, but leaves a ground effect on impact.
desc.召唤出从天空降下的虚空武器,随着刀雨的远离, 技能的涵盖范围也跟着提升. 敌人可: Ethereal weapons rain from the sky, dealing damage to enemies in a sequence of volleys, each wider but less damaging than the last. Enemies can be hit multiple times where these overlap.
desc.创造一个不断脉冲的冰霜法球，每次脉冲对周围的敌人造成元素曝露。法球的持续时间结束: Create a pulsing Orb of frost. Each pulse inflicts Elemental Exposure on nearby enemies. When the Orb's duration ends, it Detonates, dealing Cold damage to surrounding enemies and leaving behind a Cold Infusion.
desc.召唤一把幻化之刃德尔维希为你而战。当它存在时，你获得猛攻状态，同时无法使用原始物: Manifests a Dancing Dervish to fight by your side. While manifested, you have Onslaught and cannot use the original item. Cannot be supported by supports that would create other minions.
desc.召唤两把幻化之刃德尔维希为你而战。当它存在时，你获得猛攻状态，同时无法使用原始物: Manifests two Dancing Dervishes to fight by your side. While a Dancing Dervish is manifested, you have Onslaught and cannot use the original item. Cannot be supported by supports that would create other minions.
desc.创造一个电能法球，向周围的敌人射出连锁闪电箭。法球失效时留下一个闪电灌注残片。: Create an Orb of electricity that fires Chaining Lightning bolts at nearby enemies. The Orb leaves behind a Lightning Infusion Remnant when it expires.
desc.召唤一个为你提供额外生命回复的巨石魔像. 除了一般的近战攻击外, 巨石魔像会使用: Summons a Stone Golem that grants you life regeneration. In addition to its melee attack, the Stone Golem uses a rolling charge and a powerful slam that can taunt enemies.
desc.猛击地面，对周围造成大量伤害，并留下崎岖之地减速敌人。一段时间后，崎岖之地会爆发: Smash the ground, dealing damage in an area and leaving behind Jagged Ground that slows enemies. The Jagged Ground erupts in a powerful Aftershock after a duration. Cannot create Jagged Ground on top of an existing patch, or if you already have the maximum number of active patches.
desc.DNT-未使用 猛击地面，对周围造成伤害，并在地面上留下裂隙。一段时间过后，地面: DNT-UNUSED Smashes the ground, dealing damage in an area and cracking the earth. The crack will erupt in a powerful aftershock after a short duration. After using this skill, your steps will deal damage around you, cracking the earth if the previous cracks have erupted. This effect ends after a secondary duration, or after a maximum number of aftershocks.
desc.对单个敌人施加一个减益状态，持续造成混沌伤害。如果敌人在此期间被击败，此效果自身: Afflict a single enemy with a Debuff that deals Chaos damage over time. If the enemy dies while affected by Contagion, it spreads itself, Curses, and other Chaos damage over time Debuffs on the target to nearby enemies. This refreshes their durations. Reanimating or detonating a corpse affected by Contagion will cause the Minion or explosion to spread Contagion on hit.
desc.施放一个对敌人造成虚弱的范围效果, 造成缓速并且迭加一个使他们增加受到的混沌伤害: Casts a debilitating effect on enemies in an area, Hindering their movement and applying a stacking Withered debuff that increases the Chaos Damage they take. This effect can stack up to 15 times.
desc.吟唱一个使人虚弱的魔蛊，对区域内的敌人造成死亡凋零。: Channel a debilitating hex that Withers enemies in the area.
desc.发射投射物，击中时对敌人施加一个造成高额持续混沌伤害的减益效果。: Fire a Projectile that applies a powerful Chaos damage over time debuff to enemies it hits.
desc.用锤类、权杖、斧类或长杖重击地面，创造一道冲击波，对前方一片区域内的敌人造成伤害: Slams the ground with a Mace, Sceptre, Axe or Staff, creating a wave of broken ground that damages enemies in an area in front of you. Enemies hit by the wave will release a circular shockwave, dealing damage to other enemies around them.
desc.猛击地面，产生一道激荡的裂隙冲击波，接连对前方一定范围内的敌人造成伤害。一定数量: Slam the ground, creating a roiling fissure that damages enemies in a sequence of areas in front of you. A number of enemies hit by the wave will release a shockwave, damaging other enemies. Hitting an enemy with Fully Broken Armour applies Sundered Armour, making it take additional increased Physical damage.
desc.发射出一个缓慢移动的穿透投射物，能够有效冰缓敌人，并在击中地形后爆炸。: Fire a slow-moving Piercing Projectile that is effective at Chilling enemies and explodes on colliding with terrain.
desc.一个会在施法者周围爆炸的冰爆, 对敌人造成冰霜伤害, 并留下一个漩涡, 对于在其: An icy blast explodes around the caster, dealing cold damage to enemies, and leaving behind a whirling vortex which deals cold damage over time and chills enemies caught in it. If the caster targets near their Frostbolt projectiles, it will explode from a number of those projectiles instead, destroying them.
desc.DNT-未使用 持续吟唱该技能会对前方锥形范围内的敌人造成一个可叠加的减益效果和: DNT-UNUSED Apply a debuff to enemies in front of you which deals chaos damage over time. Enemies who aren't already debuffed by Blight are also hindered for a shorter secondary duration, slowing their movement. Continued channelling adds layers of damage to the debuff, each with their own duration.
desc.DNT-未使用 对你周围的敌人施加一个强力的减益效果，持续对其造成混沌伤害。随后: DNT-UNUSED Apply a powerful debuff to enemies around you which deals chaos damage over time. Then applies two additional layers in a larger area, growing greatly in size each time. Enemies are also substantially hindered for a shorter secondary duration, slowing their movement.
desc.DNT-未使用 持续吟唱时反复击中前方圆周范围内的敌人，对周围敌人造成伤害。伤害: DNT-UNUSED Repeatedly hit enemies in a circle in front of you while channelling, dealing damage to and around the enemy. The damage is continually boosted while channelling. You unleash an additional hit for each stage reached once the channelling ends.
desc.DNT-未使用 在周身引导并创造一个不断拓展的圆环区域，身处其中的敌人将被致盲。: DNT-UNUSED Channel to create an expanding circle area around you that blinds enemies within it. When you stop channelling, deals damage in a smaller area around each enemy in the circle.
desc.召唤一个闪电魔像，提高你的攻击和施法速度。 闪电魔像发射投射物法术，制造闪电球击: Summons a Lightning Golem that grants you increased Attack and Cast speed. The Lightning Golem fires a projectile spell, creates orbs of Lightning that zap nearby enemies, and casts a temporary aura that grants added Lightning Damage to spells and attacks used by the Golem and its nearby allies.
desc.挥斩两次，击中敌人会释放出给敌人造成伤害的冲击波。在挥斩中间的敌人会被击中两次。: Slashes twice, releasing waves of force that damage enemies they hit. Enemies in the middle of the slashes can be hit by both. The slashes will have a chance to inflict bleeding in Blood Stance, or have a wider angle in Sand Stance, Can be used with Axes and Swords. You are in Blood Stance by default.
desc.牺牲一个召唤生物的生命，对其周围区域造成混沌伤害。如果你没有召唤生物，可用自己的: Sacrifice the life of a Minion to deal Chaos damage in an area around it. If you have no Minions, your own life is sacrificed instead.
desc.牺牲一部分可受伤召唤生物的生命，在其附近范围内造成物理伤害。: Sacrifice some of a damageable Minion's life to deal Physical damage in an area around it.
desc.发出一束灼热光线, 被击中的敌人会受到不断叠加的燃烧效果.每叠加一层效果都会附加: Unleash a beam of fire that burns enemies it touches. Remaining in the beam intensifies the burning, adding a portion of the beam's damage in stages. Inflicts Fire Exposure at maximum stages. Enemies who leave the beam continue to burn for a duration. Increasing cast speed also increases the rate at which the beam can turn.
desc.在你的四周召唤出虚空的武器, 以你为中心不断飞舞旋转, 反复对敌人造成伤害。: An ethereal blade spins around you for a duration, repeatedly damaging enemies that it passes through.
A bolt of lightning strikes an area, dealing lightning damage.
desc.周遭每具灵柩召唤两只幽魂巨蛛, 他们将扑向你的敌人. 敌人将不会主动攻击你的蜘蛛: Raise two spectral spiders from each nearby corpse that will attack your enemies with Viper Strike. Each raised spider grants you increased Attack Speed and increased Damage with Poison. Enemies will not engage the spiders directly, and they are immune to damage.
desc.激活以召唤可复活的魔侍武士。: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Warriors.
desc.激活以召唤多个攻击性强且可复活的魔侍掠夺者，受到命令时可以进入狂暴状态。魔侍掠夺: Activate to summon aggressive, Reviving Skeletal Reavers that can enrage on Command. Skeletal Reavers do more Attack Damage and gain increased Attack speed based on their Rage
desc.激活以召唤多个攻击势大力沉且可复活的魔侍蛮兵，可以晕眩可被晕眩的敌人，受到命令时: Activate to summon hard-hitting, Reviving Skeletal Brutes that can Stun Primed enemies and Warcry on Command. This Warcry Intimidates nearby enemies and Consumes Freeze on enemies and allies to deal damage in an Area around them.
desc.激活以召唤多个远程攻击且可复活的魔侍神射手，受到命令时可以射出瓦斯之箭。: Activate to summon long-ranged, Reviving Skeletal Snipers that can fire a gas arrow on Command.
desc.激活以召唤多个可复活的魔侍冰霜法师，受到命令时可以用冰霜护盾包裹你的召唤生物。: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Frost Mages that can envelop your Minions in an icy shield on Command.
desc.激活以召唤多个可复活的魔侍风暴法师，受到命令时可以在陨落的魔侍处降下闪电打击。: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Storm Mages that can call down a lightning strike on dead Skeletons on Command.
desc.激活以召唤多个投掷炸弹且可复活的魔侍焚焰使，受到命令时可以引爆其他召唤生物。: Activate to summon bomb-throwing, Reviving Skeletal Arsonists that can detonate other Minions on Command.
desc.激活以召唤多个可复活的魔侍祭司，可以治疗其他召唤生物并复活陨落的魔侍。: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Clerics that heal other minions and revive fallen Skeletons.
desc.召唤一只会复活的远古阿兹莫里巨狼。巨狼会嚎叫，听从命令召唤万灵发起永恒狩猎。攻击: Summons an ancient Reviving Azmerian Wolf that can howl, calling to spirits convening an Eternal Hunt on Command. It Maims when attacking foes, and can lunge to bite and inflict Bleeding, or howl to inspire nearby allies.
desc.召唤一只神秘的、无法被伤害的雾鸦。可命令它向目标位置俯冲，撞破异界之镜，对一片区: Summons a mysterious undamageable Mist Raven that can be Commanded to dive at target location, crashing through an otherworldly mirror and damaging enemies in an area. The raven grants you a Frenzy Charge for each enemy it Culls.
desc.一群雾鸦萦绕在你身周，对范围内敌人造成持续伤害。其数量会随击杀敌人或因强敌的存在: A flock of mist ravens circle you, dealing damage over time in an area. Their numbers are bolstered by slain foes, or in the Presence of dangerous enemies, but the flock as a whole is considered a single minion. You can Command some of them to take flight, leaving the flock to assail your enemies.
desc.DNT-未使用 向你朝向的方向吟唱并发射一个幻象。幻象移动时你获得层数，直至其移: DNT-UNUSED Channel to project an illusion which you steer. You gain stages while it moves, until it stops at a maximum total distance. Waves of area damage frequently pulse along its path, based on your attack speed. Stop channelling to teleport to the illusion, dealing a final wave of damage.
desc.用腐化之血覆盖目标，对其造成伤害。\r\n: Covers the target in Corrupted Blood which damages them.
desc.用大量腐化之血覆盖目标，造成大量伤害。: Covers the target in large quantities of Corrupted Blood which severly damages them.
desc.使目标感染朽坏，造成持续的混沌伤害。: Inflicts Decay on the target, dealing Chaos Damage over time.
desc.消耗一个灵柩，产生一个可以搜寻敌人并点燃附近敌人的无常之核。核心在持续时间结束时: Consume a Corpse to create a volatile core that seeks out enemies and Ignites enemies near it. The core explodes at the end of its duration.
desc.目标附近的灵柩爆炸造成小范围伤害，并召唤一个自动追踪敌人的火球，可以造成较大范围: A corpse near the targeted location explodes, dealing damage in a small area and creating an orb which moves towards nearby enemies before dealing spell damage in a larger area. The explosion of the corpse is not affected by modifiers to spell damage, and cannot be reflected.
desc.使目标灵柩爆炸，造成范围伤害并转化为一座喷射的火山。它将在一段时间内持续向周围放: A targeted corpse explodes, dealing area damage and turning into a volcanic geyser, which will repeatedly unleash exploding projectiles sequentially over the surrounding area for a duration. The explosion of the corpse is not affected by modifiers to spell damage, and cannot be reflected.
desc.猛击地面，在前方制造一道灼热的裂缝，造成范围伤害，并随机分出一些更小的裂缝。用该: Slam the ground, unleashing a fiery fissure in front of you, dealing area damage and randomly releasing a number of smaller fissures branching off from it. Consume an Endurance Charge every third time you slam the ground with this skill.
desc.在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下诅咒，降低其混沌抗性。: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their Chaos Resistance.
desc.在你的面前召唤一个石化雕像，被它凝视的的敌人将会减速，持续凝视直到石化为止。: Creates a Petrification Statue in front of you, which will slow enemies with its gaze, until they become fully petrified.
desc.在脚下创造一个永恒之球，使置于其中的敌人行动速度降低。行动速度降低的量级会在永恒: Creates an Eternity Sphere at your location, which reduces the Action Speed of enemies within it. The amount of Action Speed reduction applied by the sphere decreases to zero over its duration.
desc.发出一道无法预测的旋风，它会随机移动一段时间，并反复对接触的敌人造成伤害。: Launches an unpredictable, piercing twister projectile that moves randomly for a duration, repeatedly dealing damage to enemies it intersects.
desc.投掷陷阱，触发后会在一定时间内持续发射冲击波。每股冲击波都会在其行进线路上产生连: Throws a trap which, once triggered, repeatedly releases a number of waves for a duration. Each wave deals damage in a series of small bursts in a line, ending with a larger burst. Modifiers to trap throwing speed affects how frequently it releases waves.
desc.重击目标地点。若目标周围有敌人，你可以短距离传送到它旁边，用一道猛击创造一片奉献: Slams the ground at a targeted location. If an enemy is near where you target, you'll teleport to it from a short distance away, slam, and create an area of consecrated ground.
desc.发动一次近战攻击，用闪电攻击目标区域或周围的敌人，造成范围伤害。每个目标只能被该: DNT-UNUSED Performs a melee attack, and causes lightning to strike a targeted location or nearby enemy, dealing damage in an area. Each target can only be hit once by this skill. Hitting an enemy grants an aura, giving you and your allies additional lightning damage for a duration.
desc.召唤雷霆灌注武器，然后发动一次近战攻击并用闪电攻击周围的敌人，对每个敌人周围的区: DNT-UNUSED Calls lightning down to infuse your weapon, then performs a melee attack and causes lightning to strike nearby enemies, dealing damage in an area around each. Hitting an enemy grants an aura, giving you and your allies additional lightning damage for a duration, and additional lightning bolts with Smite.
desc.DNT-未使用 通过吟唱给一支箭矢灌注混沌能量，可以蓄力积累阶数。将其发射后，飞: DNT-UNUSED Channel to infuse an arrow with chaos, gaining stages while it is held. Release to fire it, leaving spore pods in its wake. Each spore pod blooms, firing thorn arrows, which travel for a short time before dissipating. Modifiers that cause additional projectiles to be fired will only apply to the initial arrows, and the spore pods will be split between those arrows.
desc.向天空射出一串箭矢，并洒向目标区域，对击中的敌人造成伤害，并在落地后创造孢囊。每: Fire arrows into the air that rain down around the targeted area, dealing damage to enemies they hit and creating spore pods where they land. Each spore pod deals chaos damage over time to nearby enemies and slows their movement speed. The pods last for a duration before bursting, dealing area damage.
desc.向天空发射箭矢，化作箭雨落向目标区域，击中敌人造成伤害，并在落地时产生孢囊。每个: Fire arrows into the air that rain down around the targeted area, dealing damage to enemies they hit and creating spore pods where they land. Each spore pod deals chaos damage over time to nearby enemies and slows their movement speed. The pods last for a duration before bursting, dealing area damage.
desc.召唤一个停留在你身旁的圣物。当你使用攻击击中敌人，圣物会触发一个新星法术，对敌人: Summon a Holy Relic that stays near you. When you hit an enemy with an attack, the Holy Relic triggers a nova spell, with a very short cooldown, that deals physical damage to enemies and grants life regeneration to allies. This life regeneration is higher when applied to minions.
desc.召唤死亡天使贝达特的影像。这是一个非战斗实体。: Summon an image of Beidat, Archangel of Death. This is a non-combat entity.
desc.召唤一个苍白神侍。这是一个非战斗实体。: Summon a Pale Angel. This is a non-combat entity.
desc.召唤一个苍白圣侍。这是一个非战斗实体。: Summon a Pale Cherubim. This is a non-combat entity.
desc.召唤一个苍白圣使。这是一个非战斗实体。: Summon a Pale Servitor. This is a non-combat entity.
desc.召唤憎恨牧者科塔席的影像。这是一个非战斗实体。: Summon an illusion of K'tash, the Hate Shepherd. This is a non-combat entity.
desc.召唤一个鸟魔。这是一个非战斗实体。: Summon a Demon Harpy. This is a non-combat entity.
desc.召唤一个劣魔。这是一个非战斗实体。: Summon a Demon Imp. This is a non-combat entity.
desc.召唤一个兽魔。这是一个非战斗实体。: Summon a Demon Beast. This is a non-combat entity.
desc.创造一个可以附着于周围某个敌人的魔法烙印。该烙印附着后会阶段性激活，发射光束，对: DNT-UNUSED Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, firing beams which deal damage to nearby enemies and those around them. The brand will detach if the enemy dies.
desc.消耗你附近的灵柩，在短时间内再生生命和魔力，每消耗一个灵柩都有效果。: Consume Corpses near you to recover Life and Mana over a short time per Corpse Consumed.
desc.创造一个可以附着于周围某个敌人的魔法烙印。该烙印附着后会阶段性激活，召唤从天而降: DNT-UNUSED Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, causing a fiery meteor to fall from the sky. The brand will detach if the enemy dies.
desc.发射一个可索敌的穿透投射物。对击中的敌人造成缓速的减益效果，并在短时间内持续造成: Fire a Piercing Projectile that seeks out enemies. Enemies hit are inflicted with a Debuff that Hinders them and deals Chaos damage over time for a short duration.
desc.对一片区域里的敌人施加减益效果，造成持续混沌伤害，并把连接的魔蛊技能施加给它们。: Applies a debuff to enemies in an area, which deals chaos damage over Time. Linked hex curses are also applied to those enemies. The debuff deals more damage and lasts longer for each hex applied this way.  This skill cannot be used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
desc.一股逐渐拓展的能量波向前涌动，在一段时间内对锥形范围内的敌人造成伤害。被击中的每: An expanding wave of energy surges forward, damaging enemies in a cone-shaped area over a duration. Each enemy hit is inflicted with Exposure matching the element of which they took the highest damage. Only one Wave of Conviction can be active at a time
desc.施放一个光环, 使你与受光环影响的友军获得伤害和法术暴击率加成，并在面对强大敌人: Casts an aura that grants bonuses to damage and critical strike chance of spells to you and your allies, and gives a chance to create Consecrated Ground against stronger enemies.
desc.施放一个光环，使你与受光环影响友军造成的持续伤害叠加，技能效果延长。: Casts an aura that multiplies damage over time and increases skill effect duration of you and your allies.
desc.施加一个增益效果，在其耗尽之前替你承受部分伤害。和其它防卫技能共用冷却时间。: Applies a buff which can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
desc.朝目标方向发起一连串快速传送。如果使用“原地攻击”，会朝反方向传送。和其它闪现技: Performs a series of quick teleports towards a targeted location. If using the "Attack in Place" option, the direction is reversed. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
desc.发动一次旋转攻击，对你周围的敌人造成伤害，并根据你的姿态创造剑刃风暴，根据你的武: Perform a spinning attack, damaging enemies around you and creating a bladestorm matching your stance. The bladestorm repeatedly damages enemies, based on your weapon damage and attack time, for a duration. Blood bladestorms are stationary and cause Bleeding, while Sand bladestorms move slowly forwards and Blind enemies. You are in Blood Stance by default.
desc.施放一个增益效果，基于不同的姿态给近战技能施加不同的加成。再次使用该技能会在血姿: DNT-UNUSED Casts a buff that grants different bonuses to melee skills depending on your stance. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
desc.重击地面，产生前进的多重尖刺伤害敌人。在血姿态下，地面上的多重尖刺会依次爆发，多: Smash the ground to bring forth multiple spears to damage enemies. When in Blood Stance, multiple spikes burst from the ground in sequence, able to hit enemies multiple times. In Sand Stance, the spikes are thrust outwards. You are in Blood Stance by default.
desc.远程使用时，会投掷一条锁链，将你拉向被击中的敌人，并对它们身后一片区域内造成伤害: When used at range, throws out a chain, pulling you to the enemy hit dealing damage in an area behind them. When close to the enemy, just causes the area damage directly.
desc.对一片区域造成攻击伤害。: Deals attack damage in an area.
desc.施放一个光环，影响你和周围的敌人，它的效果取决于你的姿态。再次使用该技能会在血姿: DNT-UNUSED Casts an aura that affects you and nearby enemies differently depending on your stance. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
desc.施放一个光环，使你周围的敌人受到的物理伤害提高。: Casts an aura that causes nearby enemies to take more physical damage.
desc.召唤一个腐化魔像，给非魔像召唤生物附加物理伤害。这种魔像可以挥出伤害递增，速度越: Summons a Carrion Golem that grants added physical damage for your non-golem minions. The Carrion Golem attacks with a series of slashes that increase in speed and damage, as well as a cascade of bone spikes, and deals more damage for each of your non-golem minions near it.
desc.获得灵巧和给予迷踪效果的增益效果。当你具有该增益效果时，你周围一定范围内的怪物会: Grants Elusive and a buff that grants Phasing. While you have this buff, monsters that enter an area around you will be Withered. Using a skill or losing the Elusive buff ends this skill's effects. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills. Cannot be used while already Elusive.
desc.投掷一个地雷，引爆时对一片区域造成伤害，然后发射一束燃烧的投射物，在其周围降下火: Throws a mine that deals damage in an area when detonated, then launches fiery projectiles that rain down around it, each exploding to deal damage in a smaller area.
desc.投掷一个地雷，引爆时对一片区域造成伤害。: Throws a mine that deals damage in an area when detonated.
desc.投掷一个地雷，引爆时向周围发射投射物，在飞行途中快速消散，并很快消失。: Throws a mine that fires projectiles around it when detonated. These projectiles quickly dissipate as they travel, before disappearing
desc.发射一个可以抓回的投射物。当你使用回旋之刃时，抓回的投射物向外盘旋飞出，并不再返: Fires a returning projectile that can be caught. Caught projectiles spiral outwards when you use Whirling Blades and do not return.
desc.创造已经抓回的投射物，但先不把它们发射出去，并且都有即时和附加的持续时间。当你使: Creates already-caught projectiles without firing them first, both immediately and over a secondary duration. Caught projectiles spiral outwards when you use Whirling Blades and do not return.
desc.射出一支箭矢，在击中最后的目标后留在地面，将其拘束在其中。被诱捕的敌人始终视为在: Fires an arrow that remains in the ground behind its final target, tethering that enemy to it. Ensnared enemies always count as moving, and have less movement speed while trying to break the snare. The snare will break if they leave the area of effect.
desc.部署一个弩炮图腾，向空中发射弩箭，落地一小段时间后爆炸。: Deploy a Ballista Totem that fires bolts skyward, to explode a short time after landing.
desc.消耗部分魔力，获得一个增益效果，在耗尽前承受部分击中伤害。该增益根据该技能消耗的: Spends a portion of your mana to grant a buff that takes some of the damage from hits for you until depleted. The buff grants added lightning damage based on the amount of mana spent by this skill. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
desc.持续吟唱给弓箭充能后射出强力一击。在完美时机施放可以使箭矢在击中时爆炸，直接击中: Channel to charge up your bow before releasing a powerful shot. Releasing with Perfect Timing causes the arrow to explode on impact and Consume Freeze on directly Hitting. Consuming Freeze enhances the explosion.
desc.创造一道魔法烙印，附着在周围一个敌人身上。附着后会周期性激活，触发链接的法术。附: DNT-UNUSED Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, triggering linked spells. The brand will detach if the enemy dies.
desc.发出一声战吼，如果附近有敌人则强化后续近战攻击。瓦解战吼范围内的敌人，令其被击败: Perform a Warcry, Empowering subsequent Melee Attacks if there are enemies nearby. Enemies in the warcry's area are destabilised and will Combust on death. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.
desc.使你在目标区域附近的烙印超载，让它们更快激活，也更快耗尽。被超载的烙印耗尽时对一: DNT-UNUSED Overcharges your brands near the targeted area, causing them to accelerate how quickly they activate and expire. Deals damage in an area around each overcharged brand when it expires.
desc.发出一声伤害性战吼，击退附近敌人并重度晕眩可被晕眩的敌人。如果敌人被重度晕眩或击: Perform a damaging Warcry, Knocking Back nearby enemies and Heavy Stunning enemies that are Primed for Stun. If an enemy is Heavy Stunned or a currently Heavy Stunned enemy is Hit, this Skill Empowers subsequent Slams to perform an additional Aftershock. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.
desc.使用点燃敌人获得的荣耀发出战吼，将你变成冈姆的化身。化身冈姆时，你的脚步会触发火: Perform a Warcry using Glory gained by Igniting enemies to turn you into an embodiment of Kaom. While embodying Kaom, you Trigger Volcanic Steps while travelling, Melee Strikes and Slams are Ancestrally Boosted, and your Melee Strikes Trigger Volcanic Eruption.
desc.你的每一步都会猛击周围的地面，对附近敌人造成伤害。: Slam the ground around you, dealing damage to nearby enemies.
desc.从被击中的敌人发射熔火投射物，落在周围并造成范围攻击伤害。: Fire molten Projectiles from the struck enemy, which will land nearby dealing Attack damage in an area.
desc.创造一道魔法烙印，附着在周围一个敌人身上。一旦附着就会周期性激活，给附着烙印的敌: DNT-UNUSED Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, adding energy to the branded enemy. Each activation, energy spreads from each energised enemy to an enemy in range which is not energised by the brand. If the branded enemy has 20 energy, each activation will instead deal a pulse of area damage. Energy explodes when the energised enemy dies or the brand is removed, dealing damage in an area.
desc.创造一道魔法烙印，附着在周围一个敌人身上，造成持续冰霜伤害，并冰缓敌人。同时附着: DNT-UNUSED Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy, dealing cold damage over time and chilling them. It periodically activates while attached, gaining stages that raise the damage. When removed, a short-duration debuff dealing the same damage over time and chill is applied to each nearby enemy. The brand keeps its charges while detached.
desc.猛击地面，打出一道裂缝，对经过的敌人造成范围伤害，裂缝尽头会伸出尖刺。在尖刺附近: Slam the ground, sending out a fissure that deals area damage to enemies it passes under and thrusts a spike from the ground when it ends. Warcries performed near the spike will cause it to shatter, damaging surrounding enemies.
desc.发射波束，对你前方长形范围内的敌人造成闪电伤害，并呈一定角度分裂出一些小型波束，: Release a beam which deals lightning damage to enemies in a long area in front of you, and has several smaller beams branch off from it at an angle, hitting more enemies to the sides.
desc.在地面上放置一个法印，为立于其中的你与友军提供强大的增益状态，赋予生命回复并增强: Place a Sigil on the ground, providing a powerful Buff to you and Allies standing in it which grants Life Regeneration and amplifies Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield. The Buff becomes more powerful the more mana you spend while standing in the Sigil.
desc.在地面放置一个法印，当你和你的友军处于法印内时获得高额法术伤害增益状态。你在法印: Place a Sigil on the ground, providing a powerful Spell Damage Buff to you and Allies while standing in it. The Buff becomes more powerful the more mana you spend while standing in the Sigil.
desc.在你身前创造一面火焰之墙，点燃区域内的一切。你和友军发射的投射物只要穿过火墙都会: Create a wall of Fire in front of you, which Ignites everything within its area. Any Projectiles fired through the wall by you and Allies deal added Fire damage. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to also add Lightning damage to the Projectiles.
desc.召唤大范围内所有敌人（无论生死）身上的穿刺减益，为你提供钢刃碎片。基于从每个敌人: DNT-UNUSED Calls impale debuffs from enemies, alive or dead, in a large area around you to gain steel shards. Deals reflected damage in a smaller area around each such enemy based on the impales removed from them. Continues to grant shards over time until you reach maximum or spend them.
desc.在之前被诅咒的敌人周围的区域造成混沌伤害。: Deal Chaos damage in an area around the previously Cursed enemy.
desc.从地面的一系列爆发中冒出冰结之刺，每一次都对该区域内的敌人造成伤害，并将它们击退: Icicles emerge from the ground in a series of small bursts, each damaging enemies caught in the area and knocking them back in the direction of the next burst.
desc.引爆一片区域内每个敌人身上的一个诅咒，产生爆炸，造成混沌伤害，并移除诅咒。只能引: Detonate a Curse on every enemy in an area, causing explosions of Chaos damage but removing the Curse. Can only detonate Curses for which at least half of the duration has expired.
desc.创造一个水球，或移动一个现有的水球并重置它的持续时间。水球持续不断会给它范围内或: Create a sphere of water, or move an existing sphere and reset its duration. The sphere continually applies a drenched debuff with a short duration to enemies in its area or those it moves through. You can hit the sphere with other skills to inflict Cold and Lightning Ailments (other than Chill). The sphere pulses when created, at regular intervals while afflicted by an Ailment, and after moving, damaging all drenched enemies in a large area.
desc.施放所有镶嵌的光环法术，它们不会对你生效。无法镶嵌仅对敌人生效的光环。: Casts all socketed aura spells. They will not apply to you. Auras that only apply to enemies cannot be socketed.
desc.消耗 3 个耐力球竖立一个图腾，图腾会召唤灵魂战士。每位战士会使用一次已镶嵌的锤: Consume 3 Endurance Charges to Raise a Totem that conjures spirit warriors. Each warrior uses a socketed Mace Skill once, then disappears. Cannot use Channelling Skills or Skills with Cooldowns.
desc.消耗任意组合的 3 个暴击球和/或耐力球竖立一个图腾，施放镶嵌的法术。无法使用有: Consume any combination of 3 Power and/or Endurance Charges to raise a Totem that uses socketed Spells. Cannot use Skills with Cooldowns.
desc.放置一个弩炮图腾，使用镶嵌的弓类或法杖攻击技能。: Place a ballista totem which uses the socketed bow or wand attack skills.
desc.竖立一个弩炮图腾，使用镶嵌的榴弹技能，冷却回复速度显著提高。: Raise a cannon Ballista Totem which uses socketed Grenade Skills, with significantly improved Cooldown Recovery Rate.
desc.在你前方锥形范围内射出数道连锁的赤色光束。被光束击中的敌人会受到物理伤害，并被施: Expel your own blood as Chaining blood tendrils in a cone in front of you. Enemies Hit by the tendrils take Physical damage and are inflicted with Bleeding.
desc.用自己的生命提供一个增益效果，并持续一段时间，使你击中敌人时对其施加腐化之血，在: Draws out your own blood to power a buff for a duration, letting this skill inflict the Corrupting Blood debuff on enemies you hit, dealing physical damage over time for a short secondary duration. The buff's duration will be refreshed if you spend enough life before it expires.
desc.召唤一把赤色镰刀横扫选择的区域，对敌人造成物理伤害，并施加暴击弱点。无法被触发。: Conjure a bloody scythe that sweeps across the targeted area, dealing Physical damage to enemies and applying Critical Weakness. Cannot be Triggered.
desc.召唤一把赤色镰刀横扫选择的区域，对敌人造成物理伤害，之后会留下一片沸血区域，持续: Bloody scythes swipe around a selected area, hitting enemies with physical damage. An area of boiling blood is left beneath them for a duration which deals physical damage over time. Also gives a bonus to maximum Blood Charges for a secondary duration.
desc.召唤一把深渊镰刀横扫选择的区域，对敌人造成火焰伤害，并消耗点燃产生烈焰之柱。无法: Conjure an abyssal scythe that sweeps across the targeted area, dealing Fire damage to enemies and Consuming Ignite to create pillars of flame. Cannot be Triggered.
desc.施加一个增益效果，在你生命低于一半时提供保护，防止被击中时立刻失去生命，改为随时: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
desc.每次施放该法术都会在等待一小段时间后对一片区域释放闪电和混沌法术伤害的爆炸。被这: Each cast of this spell waits for a short duration, releasing a burst of lightning and chaos spell damage in an area around you when that duration ends. Enemies killed by this damage, or shortly after, will explode. The explosions of the corpses are not affected by modifiers to spell damage, and cannot be reflected.
desc.用刀剑或斧类施放旋转攻击，对周围范围内的敌人造成伤害。牺牲部分怒火可以朝前方发射: DNT-UNUSED Spin with a sword or axe to deal damage in an area around you. Sacrifices some rage to send a ragestorm forward. While enemies are inside it, the ragestorm will slow its movement and repeatedly deal attack damage based on your attack speed.
desc.发出一声战吼，强化后续的攻击。并提供一个增益状态，提高暴击率，并使攻击能够得到法: Performs a warcry, empowering subsequent attacks. Grants a buff which boosts critical strike chance and allows attacks to benefit from increases to spell damage.
desc.将你传送到敌人周围，并在短时间内施加一个增益效果。施展近战攻击会移除该增益效果，: Teleports you to a nearby enemy, applying a buff to you for a short duration and blinding the enemy for a secondary duration. Performing a melee attack with a One-Handed Weapon removes the buff to exert that attack.
desc.投掷一个陷阱，触发时旋转挥舞你装备的两把匕首、爪类或单手剑的副本，反复不断对它范: Throws a trap which, once triggered, swings two copies of your equipped Dagger, Claw or One Handed Sword around it in a circle, each repeatedly damaging enemies they spin through.
desc.DNT-未使用 朝目标地点扔出一枚爆炸投射物，并朝你周围的敌人发射额外投射物。这: DNT-UNUSED Lobs an exploding Projectile near the targeted location, and extra Projectiles toward enemies around you. The Projectiles deal Chaos damage based on your life and Energy Shield. Casting this Spell damages you.
desc.对目标地点的环形区域造成闪电伤害，并以矩形朝四角的方向延伸，其长度由你剩余的魔力: Deals lightning damage based upon your missing mana in a circular area around the targeted location, as well as in four rectangular extensions whose lengths depend upon your remaining mana.
desc.朝天射出一支箭矢落在目标地点，造成区域伤害。箭矢会刺入大地，定期朝周围的其它箭矢: Fires an arrow into the air to land at a targeted location, dealing area damage. The arrow sticks in the ground where it lands, and periodically fires a beam of lightning to another arrow near it, dealing area damage between them.
desc.挥舞盾牌，朝你面前造成三道范围伤害的冲击波。敌人可以被两道交叠的冲击波伤害。: Swipe your shield, dealing area damage in three waves in front of you. Enemies can be hit by two of the waves where they overlap.
desc.复制一把手中的近战武器并投掷出去。它会盘旋飞出，形成一个巨大的螺旋，对路径上所有: Throws a spectral copy of your melee weapon. It spins around while flying in a large spiral, damaging enemies in its path, and bouncing if it collides with walls.
desc.使用近战打击攻击敌人。打击会对可被晕眩的敌人造成重度晕眩。在造成重度晕眩时产生一: Attack enemies with a melee Strike. The Strike will cause a Heavy Stun on enemies that are Primed for Stun. Upon causing a Heavy Stun it will also create a Shockwave, dealing a large amount of damage in an area.
desc.打击会对可被晕眩的敌人造成重度晕眩。在造成重度晕眩时产生一道震波，对区域内的敌人: A Strike that causes a Heavy Stun on enemies that are Primed for Stun. Upon causing a Heavy Stun it will also create a Shockwave, dealing a large amount of damage in an area.
desc.发射一枚眼球形投射物，不断螺旋发射霰弹投射物。霰弹撞击敌人会造成冰霜伤害。眼球本: Fires a single eye projectile which constantly releases shard projectiles in a spiral. The shards will damage enemies they impact, dealing cold damage. The eye cannot damage enemies. When the eye dissipates or collides with terrain, it releases a faster spiral of extra shards.
desc.发射一枚无法击中敌人的眼球形投射物。眼球在飞行过程中会不断以螺旋状释放伤害性霰弹: Fire a single Eye Projectile which does not Hit enemies. The Eye constantly releases damaging shard Projectiles in a spiral as it flies. If the Eye passes over an Elemental Ground Surface or Orb, it will take on that surface's effect causing shards to deal more damage of the corresponding Type.
desc.激活时，被动地留下不久之前的残影。施放该法术会回归到最早的残影处，并将你的生命、: While active, passively leaves afterimages of your recent past. Cast the Spell to return to the oldest afterimage, teleporting to that location and resetting your Life, Mana and Energy Shield to the values they had at the time. Removes any upcoming damage delayed by Phased Form on use.
desc.生成一道龙卷风，持续卷入敌人并对其造成物理伤害。当龙卷风叠加元素地面效果时，将继: Create a storm that sucks in enemies and deals Physical damage over time. A Tornado that overlaps an Elemental Ground Surface absorbs that surface's Debuff, applying it to enemies inside the Tornado and causing the Tornado to deal extra damage of that element.
desc.在目标维持创造一个持续一段时间并静止不动的火焰，冰霜或闪电风暴，类型由触发风暴的: Create a stationary Fire, Cold or Lightning storm at a target location for a duration, based on the highest Elemental Damage type for the Hit that Triggered the storm. Hits which do not deal Elemental Damage will not Trigger the storm.
desc.获得一个增益效果，它会大幅降低你的能量护盾，用于将你装备的武器变为一把能量之刃。: Grants a buff which significantly lowers your maximum Energy Shield to transform your equipped weapons into Swords formed from that energy. Casting the spell again removes the buff. This skill cannot be triggered.
desc.同一名友方玩家产生羁绊并持续一段时间。在羁绊期间，你的能量护盾可以为羁绊对象阻挡: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, your Energy Shield will intercept some of the damage they would take. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
desc.同一名友方玩家产生羁绊并持续一段时间。在羁绊期间，羁绊对象按照你的生命造成额外火: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, they deal additional fire damage based on your life. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
desc.同一名友方玩家产生羁绊并持续一段时间。在羁绊期间，你的生命偷取改为给羁绊对象恢复: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, they get recovery from your life leech instead of you. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
desc.同一名友方玩家产生羁绊并持续一段时间。在羁绊期间，羁绊对象会复制你的格挡率，并在: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, they copy your block chance and recover life when they block. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
desc.同一名友方玩家产生羁绊并持续一段时间。在羁绊期间，羁绊对象可以触发你辅助的法术。: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, their hits can trigger your supported spells. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
desc.同一名友方玩家产生羁绊并持续一段时间。在羁绊期间，羁绊对象可以使用你的主手暴击率: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, they use your main hand critical strike chance. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
desc.召唤闪电击中你面前锥形范围内的所有敌人，对感电敌人造成的伤害显著提高。如果目标区: Call down Lightning to hit all enemies in a cone in front of you, dealing significantly more damage to Shocked enemies. If there is a Shocked enemy in the target area, additional lightning bolts are distributed among the targets hit. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast.
desc.获得一个增益状态，提高你的感电几率。对敌人施加感电会消耗增益效果，并在该敌人身上: Gain a Buff that boosts your Shock chance. Shocking an enemy consumes the Buff to attach an Orb of electricity to that enemy. The Orb fires bolts of electricity at nearby enemies until it expires.
desc.引导你的蚁群前往目标地点。: Direct your ants to move to the target location.
desc.将城镇中队友或你藏身处的一名玩家变成一只小动物。: Polymorph a party member in town, or a player in your hideout, into an animal.
desc.在身体前方以弧状挥动武器（双持时则挥动两把武器），对前方区域的怪物造成伤害。消灭: The character swings their weapon (or both weapons if dual wielding) in an arc, damaging monsters in an area in front of them. Killing Blows on Rare or Unique enemies grant a buff that improves Cleave for a duration. Killing Blows on Rare Enemies also steal their modifiers for a secondary duration. Only works with Axes and Swords.
desc.施展六次迅猛的戳刺，最终戳刺造成流血，并使矛尖嵌入目标体内，使其在一定时间内瘫痪: Perform a series of six rapid stabs. The final stab inflicts Bleeding and leaves a spearhead stuck in the target, Maiming them for a duration. Detonator Skills will cause the stuck spearheads to explode, dealing further damage to the target and other nearby enemies.
desc.扑向一个目标并将其洞穿。击中受到失血的敌人会引发大规模的猩红爆炸并消耗流血。该技: Lunge at a target and skewers them. Hitting an enemy that has suffered Blood Loss will cause a blood explosion and also Consume Bleeding. This skill cannot be Ancestrally Boosted.
desc.向后跳跃并用矛尖刺破前方的大地，对敌人造成伤害。击中敌人时消耗被招架减益状态，释: Jump back as you rupture the earth in front of you with spearpoints, damaging enemies. Consumes the Parried Debuff on Hitting enemies to release a shockwave and grant you a Frenzy Charge. This skill can be used while using other skills, and causes Strikes and Projectiles to miss you while jumping. This skill cannot be Ancestrally Boosted.
desc.施展环形挥斩，在你周围踢起一阵的旋风，使效果范围内的敌人减速并致盲。离开该区域会: Perform a circular slash that kicks up a Whirlwind around you, Slowing enemies and Blinding them in its area of effect. Leaving the area collapses the storm, dealing damage and causing Knockback.
desc.一次双重横扫攻击，往两侧依次横扫，被击中的敌人会被推往施法者面前。: DNT-UNUSED A two-swing attack, swiping to one side, then the other. Struck enemies are knocked in front of the user.
desc.猛刺地面，在你面前的大范围内爆发出多重战矛。战矛会留存一段时间，并在敌人接触它们: Stab the ground causing multiple spears to burst out of the ground in front of you in a large area. The spears remain for a duration, or explode when enemies touch them, damaging and Maiming them.
desc.激活以召唤一个可复活的恶魔术士，按顺序施放镶嵌的法术。: Activate to summon a Reviving Demon Magus which casts socketed Spells in order.
desc.复制你的战矛并将其掷出，击中一名敌人后爆发，向其周围大片区域内的其他多个敌人发射: Throw a single copy of your spear. When it hits an enemy it bursts, firing secondary lightning bolt Projectiles at multiple other enemies within a large area around it. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if possible to cause the main spear to split into multiple copies on impact, each of which then bursts.
desc.投掷一柄留下火焰痕迹的战矛，使敌人燃烧，随后朝相同方向投出第二柄战矛，使火焰痕迹: Throw a spear leaving a trail of Fire in its wake, Burning enemies. Then throws a second spear in the same direction, causing the trail of Fire to expand outwards.
desc.激活以召唤一头可复活的炽焰猎犬，能够点燃周围的敌人。: Activate to summon a Reviving Infernal Hound which Ignites enemies near it.
desc.召唤无敌的流水巨灵召唤生物纳薇拉为你效命。纳薇拉仅在你下达命令时行动，通过其法术: Summon Navira, an invulnerable Water Djinn Minion to do your bidding. Navira will only act when you Command her to do so, bestowing restorative blessings upon you and your Allies with her Spells.
desc.召唤无敌的火焰巨灵召唤生物鲁詹为你效命。每当你使用伤害技能时，鲁詹便会现身用巨剑: Summon Ruzhan, an invulnerable Flame Djinn Minion, to do your bidding. Ruzhan emerges to Strike enemies with his greatsword whenever you use a damaging Skill, and casts devastating Fire Spells when Commanded to do so.
desc.召唤无敌的沙之巨灵召唤生物凯拉里为你效命。凯拉里仅在你下达命令时行动，能以迅猛的: Summon Kelari, an invulnerable Sand Djinn Minion, to do your bidding. Kelari will only act when you Command him to do so. Kelari delivers swift Hits with massive Critical Hit potential.
desc.利用凯拉里的力量，被动消耗你在场处的灵柩，令灵柩甲虫召唤生物破体而出。甲虫会一直: Harness Kelari's power to passively Consume Corpses in your Presence, causing Corpse Beetle Minions to burst forth. The Beetles passively follow you until Commanded. On your Command, they rush the target and explode.
desc.发射一支火焰之箭，在命中时会爆炸。爆炸会使作用范围内的所有榴弹同时爆炸。: Fire a flaming bolt that explodes on impact. The explosion will cause any Grenades in its area of effect to also explode.
desc.为你的战弩装填火焰之箭，弩箭在命中时会爆炸。爆炸会使作用范围内的所有榴弹同时爆炸: Load your Crossbow with flaming bolts that explode on impact. The explosion will cause any Grenades in its area of effect to also explode.
desc.发射一枚威力强大的穿透箭，对护甲完全破损的敌人施加撕裂护甲效果，使对这些敌人的所: Fire a powerful Piercing bolt that applies Riven Armour to enemies with Fully Broken Armour, causing any Hits against those enemies to deal extra damage.
desc.为你的战弩装填穿透箭，对护甲完全破损的敌人施加撕裂护甲效果，使对这些敌人的所有击: Load your Crossbow with Piercing bolts that apply Riven Armour to enemies with Fully Broken Armour, causing any Hits against those enemies to deal extra damage.
desc.发射一支冰箭，在飞行结束时形成两面冰晶之墙。: Fire an icy bolt that creates two walls of Ice Crystals at the end of its flight.
desc.为你的战弩装填冰箭，弩箭在飞行结束时形成两面冰晶之墙。: Load your Crossbow with icy bolts that create two walls of Ice Crystals at the end of their flight.
desc.持续吟唱，为一支不稳定的箭矢充能。箭矢会造成毁灭性的伤害，并在击中地形时发生爆炸: Channel to charge an unstable bolt. The bolt deals devastating damage and explodes on hitting terrain, but cannot be fired at all unless fully charged. Additional Projectiles are fired in a spread, unlike other Crossbow Skills.
desc.为你的战弩装填不稳定的弩箭，需要较长的时间充能才能发射，但可以造成毁灭性的伤害，: Load your Crossbow with unstable bolts that require a lengthy charging period to fire but deal devastating damage, Pierce through enemies, and explode upon hitting terrain. Additional Projectiles are fired in a spread, unlike other Crossbow Skills.
desc.瞄准天空，发射一支索敌母箭，在目标区域内的每个敌人附近落下一支弩箭。弩箭会嵌入地: Aim skyward and fires an enemy-seeking payload which drops a bolt near every enemy in the target area. These bolts lodge in the ground and explode after a short delay.
desc.为你的战弩装填索敌母箭，弩箭会射向空中，在目标区域内的每个敌人附近落下一支弩箭。: Load your Crossbow with enemy-seeking payloads which are fired into the air, dropping a bolt near every enemy in the target area. These bolts lodge in the ground and explode after a short delay.
desc.将所有装填的弩箭射向高空，洒落在目标区域，并从中心开始向外扩散。: Fire all loaded bolts into the sky, causing them to rain down over the target area, starting at the centre and spreading outward.
desc.以等同于装填时间的间隔被动生成冰箭，直至达到上限。激活技能可以将积累的冰箭装填到: Passively generate bolts of ice at a frequency equal to reload time, up to a cap. Activate to Load the accumulated bolts into your Crossbow. All loaded bolts are fired at once, causing them to rain down over the target area.
desc.瞄准天空，发射一支充能弩箭并落在目标位置，造成伤害并嵌入地面一段时间。引爆技能会: Aims skyward and fires charged bolts that land around the target location, dealing damage and lodging in the ground for a duration. Detonator Skills will cause these bolts to explode. Can fire a limited number of bolts before needing to reload.
desc.为你的战弩装填充能箭矢，可以落在目标位置周围，并在被引爆技能击中时爆炸。再次使用: Load your Crossbow with charged bolts that land around the target location and explode if hit by a Detonator Skill. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.
desc.向前推进并以回旋攻势打击周围的敌人。: Advance while hitting enemies around you with a series of spinning Strikes.
desc.猛击地面，使敌人晕眩并将其击退，随后追身上前并施展毁灭性的二次猛击。: Slam the ground to Stun enemies and knock them away, then continue forward and perform a devastating second Slam.
desc.向后跳跃，同时发射一支冰霜箭矢，可以冰缓或冻结你逃离位置周围的敌人。此箭矢击中时: Leap backwards, firing an icy arrow which can Chill or Freeze enemies around the location from which you escaped. This arrow will create Ice Fragments on impact.
desc.持续吟唱并积蓄一次威猛的挥击，汲取大地之力并将武器扩展为巨锤。释放时猛击地面，对: Channel to charge up a heavy swing, drawing earth from the ground to enlarge your mace. Release to Slam the ground, dealing damage in an area around the impact, followed by Aftershocks dealing damage in a larger area. This Skill has its own Attack time, which is not affected by your weapon's attack speed and cannot be modified.
desc.挥舞时生成风涌，冲击远距离的敌人，敌人将会恍惚，并根据敌人与你的距离将其击退。: Batter enemies at range by generating a gust of wind as you swing. Enemies will be Dazed and Knocked Back based on how close they are to you.
desc.猛击地面，生成一个向外分支的熔岩裂缝，在移动过程中造成伤害并保持一段时间。对熔岩: Slam the ground, creating a branching Molten Fissure that deals damage as it travels and remains for a duration. Using a different Slam on a Molten Fissure creates a spreading Aftershock.
desc.此法术消耗多个冷却时间次数来召唤一圈寒冰雕像。每个雕像都会在消失前使用你的冰封横: This spell consumes multiple cooldown uses to summon icy Statues in a ring. Each Statue uses your Frozen Sweep attack once before vanishing.
desc.此攻击由你的雕像使用，在其向前移动的同时对它们周围区域造成伤害。该技能无法重复，: This attack is used by your Statues to deal damage in an area around them while stepping forward. This skill cannot repeat and can only be used by Statues from Frozen Legion.
desc.猛击地面，生成一个向外延伸的同时造成范围伤害的曲折裂缝。裂缝会在抵达目标地点时喷: Slam the ground, creating a winding fissure that deals area damage while travelling outwards. When it reaches the target location it erupts, releasing a burst of molten projectiles. After erupting, the fissure continues moving towards enemies to cause further eruptions.
desc.召唤两个会跟随你移动的触发机器人，它们会冲向你的敌人。: Summon two Triggerbots which follow you around and run towards enemies.
desc.向空中抛出一枚硬币，让命运昭示结果。: Throw a coin into the air, letting fate decide the outcome.
desc.施放一个增益效果，基于不同的姿态给攻击技能施加不同的加成。再次使用该技能会在血姿: DNT-UNUSED Casts a buff that grants different bonuses to attack skills depending on your stance. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
desc.给你的宠物浣熊造一个新家。: Create a new home for your pet Raccoon.
desc.朝目标方向发起一连串快速传送，与怪物或地形重叠时停止。如果使用“原地攻击”，会朝: Performs a series of quick teleports towards a targeted location, stopping if you would overlap with monsters or terrain. If using the "Attack in Place" option, the direction is reversed. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills. Cannot be supported.
desc.向目标射出一团火球，在飞行结束时爆炸，对小范围的敌人造成伤害。: Launches a ball of fire which explodes at the end of its flight, damaging foes in a small area.
desc.对目标发射一股混沌能量。: Fire a burst of Chaos energy at the target.
desc.同时向目标发射一枚物理投射物与一枚混沌投射物。这些投射物可在任意数量的被诅咒目标: Simultaneously fires a Physical Projectile and a Chaos Projectile at the target. These projectiles Chain through any number of Cursed targets.
desc.将节杖向上挑出，释放一道寒冰裂缝，持续爆发并造成伤害，最后爆发一根大型冰棱。最终: Sweep your Quarterstaff upwards, releasing an icy fissure which deals damage in a series of bursts culminating in a large spike. Frozen enemies hit by the final spike are dealt heavy damage but the Freeze is Consumed. Ice Crystals hit by the final spike explode.
