desc.向后翻腾并朝你的前方发出一道冰霜波，立即冻结可被冻结的敌人。: Flip backwards and send forth a Freezing wave in front of you, immediately Freezing enemies which are Primed for Freeze.
desc.快速连续发射弩箭。该技能有弹药限制。使用弩箭技能时会装填弹药，弩箭耗尽时也会自动: Fires bolts in rapid succession. The skill has limited ammunition. This ammunition will reload when using a bolt skill, or automatically when bolts are depleted.
desc.发射一连串的加热弩箭。发射时你的战弩会积蓄热度，达到最大热度会在短时间内阻止你发: Fire a stream of heated bolts. Heat builds up on your Crossbow as you fire, and reaching maximum heat will prevent you from firing these bolts for a short time. However, other Skills can Consume Heat for extra benefits.
desc.为你的战弩装填一大匣加热弩箭。发射时你的战弩会积蓄热度，达到最大热度会在短时间内: Load your Crossbow with a large clip of heated bolts. Heat builds up on your Crossbow as you fire them, and reaching maximum Heat will prevent you from firing or reloading these bolts for a short time. However, other Skills can Consume Heat for extra benefits. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.
desc.快速发射能够粉碎敌人护甲的弩箭。在需要重新装填前，可以发射有限数量的弩箭。: Rapidly fire bolts that Break enemy Armour. Can fire a limited number of bolts before needing to reload.
desc.为你的战弩装填一匣弩箭，能够快速发射并粉碎敌人护甲。再次使用此技能可以重新装填箭: Load your Crossbow with a clip of bolts that can be fired rapidly and Break enemy Armour. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.
desc.向地面快速发射冰箭，在击中位置留下一片冰霜碎片，经过一段时间后激活。激活后，当敌: Rapidly fire icy bolts at the ground, leaving a shard of ice at the impact location that arms after a duration. After arming, the ice shards explode when enemies step on them, dealing more damage the longer they have been armed, up to a maximum. Can fire a limited number of bolts before needing to reload.
desc.为你的战弩装填一匣冰箭，能够快速向地面发射，在撞击位置留下一片冰霜碎片，经过一段: Load your Crossbow with a clip of icy bolts that rapidly fire at the ground, leaving a shard of ice at the impact location that arms after a duration. After arming, the ice shards explode when enemies step on them, dealing more damage the longer they have been armed, up to a maximum. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.
desc.快速发射充能弩箭，在击中受到闪电异常状态影响的敌人时释放出伤害性脉冲。在需要重新: Rapidly fire charged bolts which release damaging pulses upon Hitting an enemy affected by a Lightning Ailment. Can fire a limited number of bolts before needing to reload.
desc.为你的战弩装填一匣充能弩箭，在击中受到闪电异常状态影响的敌人时释放出伤害性脉冲。: Load your Crossbow with a clip of charged bolts which release damaging pulses upon Hitting an enemy affected by a Lightning Ailment. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.
desc.发射一阵爆发投射物，投射物命中敌人时还会在后方小范围内造成伤害。: Fire a burst of projectiles. The projectiles have a small area of damage behind where they impact enemies.
desc.发射在飞行时分成碎片的火焰之箭，击中后对最终目标和身后一小片锥形范围内的敌人造成: Fire flaming bolts that fragment in flight, damaging and Igniting enemies on hit, and in a small cone behind their final target. These fragments can Merge.
desc.为你的战弩装填在飞行时分成碎片的火焰之箭，击中后对最终目标和身后一小片锥形范围内: Load your Crossbow with flaming bolts that fragment in flight, damaging and Igniting enemies on hit and in a small cone behind their final target. These fragments can Merge.
desc.发射在飞行时分成碎片的穿透箭矢。箭矢击中被冻结的敌人时会消耗冻结，并产生冰霜碎片: Fire Piercing bolts that fragment in flight. Bolts that hit a Frozen enemy Consume the Freeze and cause an explosion of ice shards. These fragments can Merge.
desc.为你的战弩装填在飞行时分成碎片的穿透箭矢。箭矢击中被冻结的敌人时会消耗冻结，并产: Load your Crossbow with Piercing bolts that fragment in flight. Bolts that hit a Frozen enemy Consume the Freeze and cause an explosion of shrapnel. Bolts that hit an Ice Crystal cause it to explode. These fragments can Merge.
desc.发射在飞行时分成碎片的冰箭，击中时对最终目标和身后锥形区域内的敌人造成伤害。箭矢: Fire icy bolts that  fragment in flight, damaging enemies on hit and in a small cone behind their final target. The icy coating on the bolts makes them extremely potent at Freezing enemies. These fragments can Merge.
desc.为你的战弩装填在飞行时分成碎片的冰箭，击中时对最终目标和身后锥形区域内的敌人造成: Load your Crossbow with icy bolts that fragment in flight, damaging enemies on hit and in a small cone behind their final target. The icy coating on the bolts makes them extremely potent at Freezing enemies. These fragments can Merge.
desc.快速发射在飞行时分成碎片的充能弩箭，每次击中敌人都会释放出连锁闪电光束。在需要重: Rapidly fire charged bolts that fragment in flight, releasing Chaining Lightning beams when they Hit enemies. Can fire a limited number of bursts before needing to reload. These fragments can Merge.
desc.为你的战弩装填在飞行时分成碎片的充能弩箭，每次击中敌人都会释放出连锁闪电光束。这: Load your Crossbow with charged bolts that fragment in flight, releasing Chaining Lightning beams when they Hit enemies. These fragments can Merge.
desc.发起迅猛而冷冽的打击，快速连续使用该攻击三次时，最后一次使用较为缓慢但更为强力。: Perform a fast icy Strike. Using this Attack three times in quick succession causes a final strike that is slower and more powerful.
desc.从空中降下巨大的冰凌，在目标位置造成高额伤害。向近距离施放会使你在施法时向后跳跃: Call down a mass of ice from the sky, dealing high damage at the targeted location. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast. Consumes a Fire Infusion if possible to cause a devastating blast of ice and fire.
desc.召唤一颗从无光深渊升起的恐怖颅骨，噬咬目标位置的敌人并造成高额伤害，同时在飞行轨: Conjure a horrific skull rising from the lightless depths to bite your enemies dealing high damage at target location and leaving Withering Ground in its wake. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast.
desc.部署弩炮图腾，降下定身、瘫痪弩箭齐射。: Deploy a Ballista Totem that rains down a salvo of Pinning, Maiming bolts.
desc.召唤一阵秘能风暴，位于其中时强化你消耗魔力的法术。维持风暴会持续消耗你的魔力，每: Create a storm of arcane energies that Empowers your Mana-costing Spells while you remain inside it. Maintaining the storm constantly drains your Mana, and spending more causes it to drain faster. The storm will dissipate when you exit it or run out of Mana.
desc.创造一股死亡能量风暴，身处其中时，强化所有消耗魔力的法术并附加冰霜伤害。维持风暴: DNT-UNUSED Create a storm of deathly energies that Empowers your Mana-costing Spells with Cold damage while you remain inside it. Maintaining the storm constantly drains your Mana, and spending more causes it to drain faster. As the storm persists it creates slowly expanding Chilled Ground. Enemies that enter the eye of the storm are Blinded. When you leave the storm, or run out of Mana, the storm ends and unleashes a death-wave, damaging enemies on the Chilled Ground.
desc.激活时召唤冰霜屏障，冰霜屏障会累积层数。当屏障具有层数时，击中你的近战攻击会移除: While active, conjures an icy barrier that gains stages over time. While the barrier has stages, Melee Attacks that hit you will remove a stage to cause a burst of ice that deals Cold Spell damage to the attacker.
desc.DNT-未使用 吟唱该技能时，释放出多股电能脉冲，造成闪电伤害。: DNT-UNUSED While you channel this skill, it releases pulses of electrical energy, dealing lightning damage.
desc.持续吟唱为能量护盾充能，可使你的能量护盾溢出上限。当你受到伤害或你的能量护盾达到: Channel to Recharge Energy Shield and allow that Recharge to Overflow. Channelling ends when you take damage or your Energy Shield is fully Overflowed.
desc.冲向一名敌人并发起打击，终结生命值足够低的敌人。若目标被终结，将对范围内其他可终: Dash to an enemy and Strike them, Culling enemies if their life is low enough and performing additional dashing Strikes to other Cullable targets in range if your target was Culled. Each enemy killed by this strike grants a Power Charge, with higher Rarity monsters granting additional Charges. Enemies around you that can be Culled will be highlighted.
desc.为你的节杖注入雷电之能，随后猛击地面，在你前方大片锥形范围内造成伤害。消耗你拥有: Suffuse your Quarterstaff with electrical energy, then Slam the ground to deal damage in a large cone in front of you. Consumes your Power Charges to fire Lightning Projectiles forwards from the impact.
desc.从大地中拔起一座火山，对站在上方的敌人造成伤害并喷发大量炽热投射物。火山存续期间: Uplift a volcano from the earth, damaging enemies standing on it and releasing a spray of molten Projectiles. While the volcano persists, Slamming it will cause another Projectile spray. Channelling this Skill for longer makes the initial eruption more violent, but does not affect subsequent Projectile sprays.
desc.激活后召唤一组狼群伙伴。无论召唤的狼群中有多少只狼，该狼群在涉及计数或限制伙伴的: Activate to summon a pack of Wolf Companions. The pack treated as a single Companion for effects that count or limit Companions, regardless of the number of Wolves in the pack.
desc.激活以召唤一群鬣狗伙伴。无论群中鬣狗数量多少，该群体在涉及计数或限制伙伴的效果中: Activate to summon a cackle of Hyena Companions. The cackle is treated as a single Companion for effects that count or limit Companions, regardless of the number of Hyenas in the cackle. Hyenas whoop when they first appear, Hindering nearby enemies, and have a chance to Maim enemies they Hit.
desc.冲向一名敌人并以攻击发起打击，释放一股寒流，将附近的敌人包裹在冰霜碎片中。对这些: Dash to an enemy and Strike them with an Attack that manifests a wave of cold, coating nearby enemies in shards of ice. Dealing enough damage to these enemies will shatter the shards, causing an icy explosion that deals Attack damage.
desc.为你的弓类武器搭上一束附魔箭矢，在你向前飞身旋转的时候以环形射出，并尽量径直飞向: Load your Bow with a volley of enchanted arrows and fire them in a circle as you spin forward, firing directly at targets if possible. Consumes Frenzy Charges to cause the arrows to deal more damage and Chain to other targets. Each target can only be Hit once.
desc.用武器发动攻击，击中给敌人施加一个减益效果。一旦具有该减益效果的敌人中毒时被击败: Attacks with your weapon, inflicting a debuff on enemies hit by the strike. If a debuffed enemy dies while poisoned, Pestilent Strike inflicts a secondary chaos damage over time debuff on enemies around them, based on the poisons on the slain enemy. This damage is not affected by your damage modifiers.
desc.变形为一头巨熊，用利爪肆意横扫。击中敌人时产生怒火。: Shapeshift into a Bear and rake enemies with your claws, generating Rage on Hit.
desc.铺开一条道路，可在道路上滑行。移动技能会取消滑行，滑行时可时施放已其他技能。: Make path. Slide on path. Movement skill cancel slide. Cast any other skill while sliding.
desc.变形为狼人，并跃向目标地点，对落点范围内的敌人造成伤害。此技能将触发掠食者印记，: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and leap to a target location, damaging enemies in an area around where you land. Predator's Mark will be Triggered targeting the highest Rarity enemy Hit, or if a Mark gem is socketed into this Skill, that Mark will be Triggered instead. Using this Skill allows any Wolf Minions you have to leap immediately.
desc.召唤一道能够造成感电的闪电，打击小范围内的敌人。: Call down a Shocking bolt of Lightning to strike enemies in a small area.
desc.对你的敌人无情痛击。: Strike your foes down with a powerful blow.
desc.变形为巨熊并向前方横冲直撞，在奔行时猛击地面。持续吟唱会在短时间内结束，但可通过: Shapeshift into a Bear and charge forward, Slamming the ground as you run. Channelling ends after a short amount of time but can be prolonged by spending Rage.
desc.大力掷出战矛。尽量消耗一个狂怒球，使战矛结束飞行时爆炸。: Hurl your Spear with force. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if you have one to cause the Spear to explode at the end of its flight.
desc.在短时间内为用时间魔法强化自身，强化你施放下一个可重复法术，使其重复施放多次。无: Augment yourself with temporal magic for a short duration, Empowering the next Repeatable Spell you cast to Repeat multiple times. Cannot Empower Skills with a Cooldown.
desc.召唤雷霆风暴，引发闪电与暴雨。区域内的敌人将被浸湿，更容易感电或冻结。区域内的植: Conjure a thunderstorm which causes lightning strikes and torrential rain in an area. Enemies in the area are Drenched, causing them to become Shocked or Frozen more easily. Plants in the area become Overgrown.
desc.敌人的灵柩剧烈爆炸，对周围造成火焰伤害。: The enemy's Corpse violently explodes, dealing Fire damage in an area around it.
desc.变形为巨熊并猛力猛击地面，引发两道震波。可消耗怒火制造更大的震波，并留下崎岖之地: Shapeshift into a Bear and Slam the ground with great force, causing a pair of shockwaves. Can spend Rage to create larger shockwaves that leave behind Jagged Ground.
desc.变形为巨熊，发出挑衅咆哮。若周围有敌人则立即获得怒火，并强化后续攻击，从而使敌人: Shapeshift into a Bear and roar in defiance, immediately gaining Rage if there are enemies nearby and Empowering subsequent Attacks to Break Armour. Alternatively, socketing a human-form Warcry into this Skill triggers that Warcry instead, and augments its damage and area. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.
desc.激活时，当你令敌人感电时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的法术。: While active, gains Energy when you Shock enemies and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，当你令敌人冻结时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的法术。: While active, gains Energy when you Freeze enemies and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，当你点燃敌人时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的法术。: While active, gains Energy when you Ignite enemies and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，当你令敌人冻结、感电或点燃时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的法术。: While active, gains Energy when you Freeze, Shock, or Ignite enemies, and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，当你使用近战攻击击败敌人时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的法术。: While active, gains Energy when you kill enemies with Melee Attacks and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，当你被晕眩时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的法术。: While active, gains Energy when you are Stunned and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，当你受到伤害时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的法术。: While active, gains Energy when you take damage and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，当你对敌人造成暴击时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的法术。: While active, gains Energy when you Critically Hit enemies and triggers socketed Spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，当你的能量护盾受到敌人击中伤害时获得能量。积累一定的能量后使用该咒祈，即: While active, gains Energy when your Energy Shield is damaged by Enemy Hits. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to trigger socketed Spells, and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough Energy.
desc.激活时，当你闪避翻滚时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的法术。: While active, gains Energy when you dodge roll and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，当你持续吟唱一个技能时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的法术。: While active, gains Energy while you're channelling a skill and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，当你使用近战攻击令敌人晕眩时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的法术。: While active, gains Energy when you Stun enemies with Melee Attacks and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，每当你进行闪避翻滚，就会产生一个短暂持续的自身复制体。复制体可被敌人伤害: While active, creates a short-lived illusory copy of yourself whenever you dodge roll. The copy can be damaged by enemies, and copies that are destroyed by an enemy will drop a Remnant that grants you a Power Charge on pickup.

While active, creates a short-lived illusory copy of yourself whenever you dodge roll. The copy can be damaged by enemies, and copies that are destroyed by an enemy will cause damaging explosions. Copies created this way have 1 Life.
desc.激活时，你会周期性获得鬼影缠身。如果你在具有鬼影缠身时被击中，则会立即将其消耗，: While active, causes you to periodically gain Ghost Shrouds. If you are Hit while you have a Ghost Shroud, it is immediately consumed to recover Energy Shield based on your Evasion.
desc.捕获一个被击败的怪物的灵魂，改变该宝石以使你能够将怪物的鬼魂召唤为复活召唤生物。: Capture the spirit of a defeated monster, transforming this gem to instead allow you to summon the monster's ghost as a Reviving Minion.
desc.在短时间内未使用技能或被击中即可获得潜行。: Gain Stealth after not using Skills or being Hit for a short time.
desc.清除激活的弩箭并装填弹药。: Clear your active Bolt and reload any ammunition.
desc.召唤一名可复活的同伴协助作战。佣兵可以使用镶嵌的攻击，可以在技能面板中给予装备。: Summon a Reviving Companion to aid you in combat. The Mercenary will use socketed Attacks, and can be given equipment in the Skills Panel.
desc.发射一枚弹跳的榴弹，引线燃尽时，释放出毁灭性的炽烈爆炸。: Fire a bouncing Grenade that unleashes a devastating fiery blast when its fuse expires.
desc.发射一枚弹跳的榴弹，引线燃尽时，释放导致致盲和晕眩的炽烈爆炸。: Fire a bouncing Grenade that unleashes a Blinding, Stunning explosion when its fuse expires.
desc.发射一枚弹跳的榴弹，引线燃尽时，产生一阵毒气，对敌人造成伤害，并在身后留下弥漫的: Fire a bouncing Grenade that causes a burst of Poison gas when its fuse expires, damaging enemies and leaving behind a growing Poison cloud. Burning effects or Detonator skills will cause the cloud to explode in a fiery blast.
desc.发射一枚弹跳的榴弹，引线燃尽或击中敌人时喷射出一滩黏油，造成少量伤害，并使地面和: Fire a bouncing Grenade that bursts in a spray of Oil when the fuse expires or when it impacts an Enemy, dealing minimal damage but covering the ground and nearby enemies in Oil. Oil created this way can be Ignited by Detonator Skills or Ignited Ground.
desc.以弹跳的炸弹发起攻击，击中时产生爆炸。: Attacks with a bouncing bomb that explodes on hit.
desc.发射一枚弹跳的榴弹，引线燃尽时释放出触电闪电爆炸，使所有对敌人的闪电击中在一段时: Fire a bouncing Grenade that discharges an Electrocuting Lightning blast when its fuse expires, causing all Lightning Hits against enemies to contribute to Electrocution buildup for a duration.
desc.将一个魔侍穿刺在骨刺上，使附近的召唤生物陷入狂乱，只要尖刺存在，就会使他们可以更: Skewer a Skeleton on a bone spike to send nearby Minions into a frenzy as long as the spike remains, making their skills faster and harder hitting.  The bone spike is itself a Minion. If it dies, the effect ends immediately.
desc.一次猛击，击中不可移动的敌人时会引发余震。: A Slam that causes Aftershocks when hitting an Immobilised enemy.
desc.所有魔侍掠夺者陷入狂暴，逐渐失去生命，并在击中时获得怒火。: Enrage all Skeletal Reavers, causing them to lose life over time and gain Rage on hit.
desc.从空中降下一支箭矢，在落点产生一团可燃的剧毒瓦斯云雾。如果云雾被引爆技能击中或受: Rain an arrow down from above, creating a cloud of flammable poisonous gas where it lands. The cloud will detonate if hit by a Detonator skill or if an Ignited enemy touches it, creating a fiery explosion.
desc.阿兹莫里巨狼发出嚎叫，向万灵发出呼唤，开启永恒狩猎。在永恒狩猎持续期间，万灵会显: The Azmerian Wolf howls, reaching out to the spirits to begin an Eternal Hunt. While the Eternal Hunt persists, spirits manifest as spectral wolves to ambush foes, damaging and Maiming enemies they Hit before disappearing.
desc.闪电劈向范围内所有陨落的魔侍，在其周围产生感电地面。: Lightning bolts strike all fallen Skeletons in the area, creating Shocked Ground around them.
desc.引爆一个当前生命低于一定阈值的友方召唤生物，对周围的敌人造成高额攻击伤害。: Detonate an allied Minion whose current Life is below a threshold, dealing heavy Attack damage to nearby enemies.
desc.命令纳薇拉强化你的能量护盾，使其立即开始充能，并在持续期间提升你的能量护盾充能速: Command Navira to bolster your Energy Shield, causing it to begin Recharging immediately and granting you increased Energy Shield Recharge Rate for a duration.
desc.当你命令纳薇拉使用技能时，她同时会释放一道恢复波纹，使波及到的你及其他友军在短时: When you Command Navira to use a Skill, she also emits a restorative wave that grants you and any other Allies it touches increased Mana Regeneration for a short duration.
desc.发起一连串凶狠的打击。连续使用时，第三次使用会打击三次，第四次使用会发动绝杀打击: Perform a series of aggressive Strikes. When used in quick succession, the third use Strikes three times, and the fourth use performs a Final Strike that calls down a powerful Shocking bolt.
desc.冲向一名敌人并发起打击，立即重度晕眩可被晕眩的敌人。若首个目标重度晕眩，则会对范: Dash to an enemy and Strike them, instantly Heavily Stunning enemies which are Primed for Stun and performing additional dashing Strikes to other Primed targets in range if your first target was Stunned. Heavy Stunning an enemy with this Skill grants you a Buff that causes your Quarterstaff Attacks to also fire Projectiles for a short duration. Heavy Stunning additional enemies adds to the Buff's duration.
desc.消耗所有暴击球，为节杖注入雷电之能，使你的节杖攻击附加闪电伤害和一道闪电震波。增: Consume all Power Charges to charge your Quarterstaff with electricity, adding Lightning damage and a Lightning shockwave to your Quarterstaff Attacks. Reusing this skill while the Buff is active adds to the Buff's duration and damage.
desc.冲向一个目标，并以节杖发起打击。如果目标感电，则会消耗感电，在目标周围释放一道闪: Dash to a target and Strike them with your Quarterstaff. If the target is Shocked, Consume their Shock to release a Lightning shockwave around the target and grant you a Power Charge. This skill cannot be Ancestrally Boosted.
desc.成功使用其他技能打击敌人可以积累连击。达到连击上限后，使用此技能可使长杖上的风雷: Build Combo by successfully Striking Enemies with other skills. After reaching maximum Combo, use this skill to cause the Bell on your staff to grow to massive size as you drop it on the ground. The Bell damages enemies on impact and can be Hit by your skills, creating a damaging shockwave. Elemental Ailments applied to the Bell cause its shockwaves to deal extra damage of the corresponding type, and Hits which would have caused Knockback increase the area of effect of the shockwaves.
desc.指示你的永久召唤生物攻击一个目标，或移动到一个位置。: Direct your permanent minions to attack a target or move to a location.
desc.向后腾跃并持杖击碎地面，召唤一簇冰晶，它可以被你和敌人破坏。冰晶被摧毁时产生寒冰: Leap backward and crack the ground with your staff to call forth an Ice Crystal which can be damaged by you and enemies. If the Crystal is destroyed it causes an icy explosion. This skill can be used while using other skills.
desc.持续吟唱，召唤一阵悬浮的尖刺，随后将其射向敌人并爆炸。碎片穿刺被击中的敌人，使后: Channel to conjure a swarm of bone spikes in the air, then release to fire them at enemies and explode. Shrapnel Impales enemies Hit, causing subsequent Attack Hits against those targets to deal extra damage. Consumes your Power Charges to cause much larger explosions.
desc.在你的周围升起一圈尖刺，当敌人触及时会被摧毁，对敌人造成伤害和定身。生成新的一圈: Raise a ring of bone spikes around you. The spikes are destroyed when enemies touch them, damaging and Pinning those enemies. Raising a new ring of spikes destroys the previous one.
desc.从前方的地面中升起骨刺，对敌人造成伤害。区域内的灵柩和被击败的可复活召唤生物将被: Raise spikes of bone from the earth in front of you, damaging enemies. The bones of Corpses and dead Reviving Minions in the area are ripped out and reassembled into short-lived Bone Construct Minions that fight for you. Larger Corpses create more than one Bone Construct.
desc.持续吟唱积蓄力量，随后发射一支燃烧箭矢。达到最大层数时，箭矢会在飞行结束时引爆。: Channel to charge up before firing off a burning arrow. At maximum stages, the arrow will create a Detonating explosion at the end of its flight.
desc.射出一支毒素箭矢，击中时产生毒素爆发，影响范围内的所有敌人。: Fire a virulent arrow that creates a burst of Poison on hit, affecting all enemies in an area.
desc.向空中发射剧毒芽孢雨。芽孢在击中时造成伤害，短暂延迟后引爆，可以对其施加中毒，使: Fire a rain of Toxic Pustules into the air. The Pustules deal damage on impact, then Detonate after a delay. They can also be Poisoned, causing them to Detonate faster and more violently.
desc.发射一支箭矢并嵌入落点一段时间。在持续时间结束时，一道闪电劈向箭矢，将其击碎并对: Fire an arrow that embeds where it lands for a short duration. At the end of the duration, a Lightning Bolt strikes the arrow, disintegrating it and damaging enemies, with a high chance to Shock. Shocking any enemy with the Bolt also applies Shock to all enemies near the impact.
desc.发射一支箭矢并嵌入落点一段时间。在持续时间结束时，箭矢以灵体烈焰形式爆炸，化为灰: Fires an arrow that embeds where it lands for a short duration. At the end of the duration, the arrow explodes in spectral flame, turning it to ashes and damaging enemies, with a high chance to Ignite. Igniting any enemy with the Explosion also applies Ignite to enemies within range.
desc.发射一支从上方落下的箭矢，产生闪电爆发。箭矢会留在地面，任何连锁闪电光束都可以与: Fire an arrow that drops from above, creating a Lightning burst. The arrow remains in the ground, and any Chaining Lightning beams can Chain to it. When Chained to, the arrows charge up for a brief period before releasing another Lightning burst. The Lightning Arrow Skill reduces this delay, causing bursts to happen more quickly.
desc.向地面发射一支有毒的箭矢，在飞行结束时产生一团可燃的剧毒瓦斯云雾。如果云雾被引爆: Fire a noxious arrow at the ground, creating a cloud of flammable poisonous gas at the end of its flight. The cloud will detonate if hit by a Detonator skill or if an Ignited enemy touches it, creating a fiery explosion.
desc.向空中发射一阵箭矢，使箭矢从上方落下。消耗一个狂怒球可发射更多箭矢。: Fire a hail of arrows into the air, causing them to rain from above. Consumes a Frenzy Charge to fire more arrows.
desc.产生一个炽焰法球，周期性释放出火焰脉冲。距离法球极近的敌人会被点燃。烈焰爆破可以: Create a fiery Orb that periodically releases fiery pulses. Enemies that are very close to the Orb are Ignited. Flameblast can target a Solar Orb to be centred on the Orb instead of your location.
desc.发射一个大型火球，击中时爆炸。爆炸尽量消耗一次火焰灌注来发射一圈较小的火弹。: Launch a large ball of Fire which explodes on impact. The explosion Consumes a Fire Infusion if possible to launch a ring of smaller firebolts.
desc.激活时，储存你造成的所有中毒伤害的一部分。使用此技能释放储存的毒素，伤害并使你周: While active, stores a portion of the Poison Damage you deal. Using this Skill unleashes the stored Poison to damage and Poison enemies around you.
desc.发射一支电光箭矢，击中时产生范围爆炸。击中敌人会对其附着一根电殛棒，使其受到的所: Fire an electrifying arrow that explodes in an Area on Hit. Hitting an enemy will attach an Electrocuting Rod to them, causing all incoming Lightning damage to build up Electrocution. This rod is removed when the enemy is next Electrocuted.
desc.消耗冻结、感电或点燃敌人的元素能量，产生一道元素爆炸，并留下一个灌注残片。爆炸会: Consume the elemental energy from a Frozen, Shocked or Ignited enemy, creating an elemental blast that leaves behind an Infusion Remnant. The blast will spread to other enemies affected by the same Ailment, but those blasts cannot spread further. Can also be cast on a Frostbolt to create a larger cold blast.
desc.持续吟唱用火焰为你的武器充能，在完美时机施放会创造一波火焰波浪，杀伤敌人。: Channel to charge up your weapon with Fire. Releasing with Perfect Timing will create a damaging wave of intense Fire.
desc.举起盾牌，格挡所有来袭的可格挡击中。在敌人靠近时格挡后立即释放以进行盾牌猛击，对: Raise your Shield to Block all incoming Blockable hits. Release immediately after Blocking when an enemy is close to perform a Shield Bash, damaging and Stunning enemies. While your Shield is raised you cannot be Light Stunned by hits you Block, but Blocking too much damage may Heavy Stun you. You cannot Evade while your Shield is raised, but Evasion instead grants an equal chance to avoid this Heavy Stun buildup.
desc.使用武器反复捶打你的盾牌，在你周围的区域产生伤害性震波。被震波击中的敌人在一段时: Repeatedly hammer your Shield with your weapon causing damaging shockwaves in an area around you. Enemies hit by the shockwave lose Armour for a duration. While Channelling Resonating Shield, your Shield is raised and you will Block all incoming Blockable hits.
desc.召唤汹涌的秘术能量来回复你的魔力。激活时，击败带有元素异常状态的敌人有几率生成一: Conjure surging arcane energy to restore your Mana. While active, enemies you kill affected by Elemental Ailments have a chance to spawn a Mana Remnant, and Critically Hitting a target with Elemental Ailments spawns a Mana Remnant every few seconds. Picking up a Mana Remnant grants you Mana which can Overflow maximum Mana.
desc.汇聚仇恨能量以滋养你的怒火与生命。激活期间，被你击杀的流血敌人有几率生成一个仇恨: Conjure hateful energy to fuel your Rage and Life. While active, Bleeding enemies you kill have a chance to spawn a Hateful Remnant, and Hitting a Bleeding target spawns a Hateful Remnant every few seconds. Picking up a Hateful Remnant grants you Rage and recovers Life based on your current Rage.
desc.激活时，被动增加你的格挡几率，并随时间为你的盾牌注入熔岩。完全注入后，你下一次举: While active, increases your Block Chance passively and imbues your Shield with lava over time. When fully imbued, your next Block with your Shield raised will expend the lava to Trigger the Magma Spray skill and grant you an Endurance Charge.
desc.使用弓发射一支箭矢。: Fire an arrow with your Bow.
desc.从你的战弩射出一支箭矢。: Fire a bolt from your crossbow.
desc.发射一枚会弹跳的榴弹，其引信耗尽时释放破片爆炸。: Fire a bouncing Grenade that unleashes a shrapnel blast when its fuse expires.
desc.使用近战武器对你的敌人无情痛击。: Strike your foes down with a powerful blow using a melee weapon.
desc.跃向空中，落地时对敌人造成伤害。: Jump into the air, damaging enemies where you land.
desc.向目标发射一束燃烧的投射物。: Launch a fiery Projectile towards a target.
desc.竖立一个图腾猛击其周围的地面，反复对周围的敌人造成伤害。该猛击击中崎岖之地会使其: Raise a Totem that Slams the ground around it, repeatedly damaging nearby enemies. Jagged Ground erupts when hit by this Slam, damaging enemies standing on it. The Totem cannot create Jagged Ground. This Skill can be used while Shapeshifted.
desc.以弧形发射冰冷的投射物。多个投射物可以击中同一个敌人。: Launch icy Projectiles in a sweeping arc. Multiple Projectiles can hit the same enemy.
desc.向空中发射一支箭矢，短暂的延迟后落下，在击中位置对敌人造成伤害并产生一株成长的植: Fire an arrow into the air that lands after a short delay, damaging enemies and causing a plant to spring up at the impact location. The plant sprouts vines that latch onto nearby enemies, Slowing their movement speed and dealing Chaos damage over time. The plant can be Poisoned, causing it to deal more damage.
desc.使用弓类和战矛时，你可以驾驭一头可骑乘的伙伴恐喙鸟。骑乘恐喙鸟时，你只能使用弓类: Harnesses a Companion Rhoa you can mount while you're wielding a Bow or Spear. While mounted you can use Bow, thrown Spear, and Mark Skills, and are much less slowed while using Skills, but being Hit will cause Heavy Stun buildup. While you aren't mounted, the Rhoa will attack your enemies alongside you with its beak, but can be damaged.
desc.当被辅助技能施加中毒的敌人被击败时触发，根据积蓄的灾难值，在周围造成物理伤害。: Triggered when an enemy Poisoned by a supported skill dies, dealing Physical damage around them based on the built-up Plague.
desc.消耗一个灵柩，产生一团可燃的毒素瓦斯云雾。任何燃烧效果或引爆技能会引爆瓦斯云，产: Consume a Corpse to create a cloud of flammable Poisonous gas. Any Burning effects or Detonator skills will explode the gas cloud, creating a fiery explosion.
desc.激活时，火焰法术还会召唤愤怒狂灵，这些只能存在极短时间的愤怒狂灵会无视命令，冲至: While active, Fire Spells you use yourself will also summon Raging Spirits, which are short-lived flaming skulls that rush at nearby enemies and rapidly Attack them, ignoring commands. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them.
desc.当被辅助技能消耗点燃、感电或冻结效果时触发，根据所消耗的异常状态造成相应类型的伤: Triggered when supported skill Consumes Ignite, Shock, or Freeze, to deal damage of Types matching the Consumed Ailments.
desc.当被辅助技能受到元素地面效果增强时触发，造成与该元素相匹配的伤害。: Triggered when supported skill is boosted by an Elemental Ground Surface to deal damage of the matching Element.
desc.舞动战矛扇起一阵旋龙，旋龙会不规则移动，致盲并反复击中内部的敌人。如果旋龙触碰到: Whip up a twister with a flick of your Spear. The twister moves forward erratically, Blinding and repeatedly Hitting enemies within. If a twister touches a Whirlwind from your other skills, it Consumes the Whirlwind to create additional twisters that deal more damage. Passing over Elemental Ground Surfaces or Consuming an elemental Whirlwind will grant twisters extra damage of that element.
desc.掷出一柄负荷战矛，穿透敌人并嵌入地形。战矛会在引爆时间结束或被引爆时发生爆炸。尽: Hurl a single payload Spear that pierces through enemies and lodges in terrain where it lands. The Spear will explode at the end of its Detonation Time or if Detonated. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if you have one to explode immediately, dealing more damage in a cross-shaped area and creating Ignited Ground.
desc.冲向一名敌人并消除其抗性。击中具有正元素抗性的敌人会使其最高的元素抗性在一段时间: Dash to an enemy and nullify their Resistance. Hitting an enemy with positive Elemental Resistance will reduce their highest Elemental Resistance to 0 for a duration and triggers Infuse Weapon, granting your Spear the maximum possible Surges corresponding to the removed Resistance. If this skill doesn't remove any Resistances, its cooldown is reset. This skill cannot be Ancestrally Boosted.
desc.跃向空中并将战矛刺入目标位置的地面，放射出一道闪电充能的震波。: Leap into the air and plunge your Spear into the ground at the target location, emitting a Lightning-charged shockwave.
desc.激活时，每隔一段获得增益状态层数，每层使你的闪避提高。拥有该增益状态时被敌人击中: While active, periodically grants stages of a buff that gives you more Evasion per stage. Being Hit by an Enemy while you have this buff consumes all stages to damage and Knock Back enemies around you.
desc.为一个灵柩添加不敬符文印记，持续对周围的敌人造成混沌伤害。仪式完成时消耗灵柩，并: Mark a Corpse with a profane rune, dealing Chaos damage over time to nearby enemies. When the ritual is complete the Corpse is consumed and you gain a Power Charge.
desc.将一个魔侍穿刺在骨刺上，只要尖刺存在，就能使你获得强大的法术伤害增益状态。不影响: Skewer a Skeleton on a bone spike, granting you a powerful Spell damage Buff as long as the spike remains. Does not affect your Minions.  The bone spike is itself a Minion. If it dies, the effect ends immediately.
desc.立起一个图腾，对敌人施加造成持续混沌伤害的减益状态。: Raise a Totem that bombards enemies afflicted by Chaos damage over time Debuffs.
desc.向周围每个受到持续混沌伤害减益状态影响的敌人发射一个投射物，对受到多个减益状态影: Fire a Projectile at every nearby enemy that is afflicted by a Chaos damage over time Debuff. Fires multiple Projectiles at enemies afflicted by multiple Debuffs, but Projectile count cannot be otherwise modified.
desc.将空气晶化为寒冰碎片，击中地面时向外爆发。: Crystallises the air into icy shards that explode outwards when they hit the ground.
desc.技能激活时，你的可复活的召唤生物在被击败时会将其生命上限的一部分储存在可收集的饕: While active, your Reviving Minions store a percentage of their maximum Life in a collectible Grim Remnant on death. Using Grim Resurrection Consumes the Life you've collected to Revive up to that much total Life of dead Minions.
desc.将所有镶嵌的诅咒技能合并为持续的光环，对附近的敌人施加这些效果。: Turn socketed Curse skills into vile Auras, applying their effects to all nearby enemies.
desc.激活时，当你的一个永久性召唤生物被击败时，你会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的: While active, gains Energy when one of your Persistent Minions is Killed, and triggers socketed Spells upon reaching maximum Energy. Very underlevelled Minions will incur an Energy generation penalty. Cannot socket Spells which create Minions.
desc.激活时，使用从敌人身上搜刮的护甲碎片来强化自身。使一个敌人的护甲完全破损后，根据: While active, uses fragments of armour scavenged from enemies to bolster your own. Fully Breaking an enemy's Armour grants you stacks of Scavenged Plating for a duration based on the enemy's Rarity, and you gain Armour and Thorns per stack. Normal enemies grant 1 stack, Magic enemies grant 2 stacks, Rare enemies grant 5 stacks and Unique enemies grant 10 stacks.
desc.在一段时间内从敌人身上偷取法力，同时短暂缓速其行动。: Leech Mana from an enemy over a prolonged period, as well as briefly Hindering them.
desc.召唤出一圈持续较短时间的仪式铭文。持续时间结束时，从区域内的敌人处爆发出尖刺，造: Conjure a circle of ritual inscriptions that last for a short duration. When the duration ends, spikes of bone erupt from enemies in the area, damaging them and potentially causing Bleeding.
desc.激活时，用一个冷却时间较短的法术代替你的闪避翻滚，让你穿越空间，立即出现在中等距: While active, replaces your dodge roll with a short-cooldown Spell that allows you to tunnel through space, instantly reappearing a medium distance away.
desc.用爆炸辅助的跳跃取代你的闪避翻滚，从你的义肢加农炮腿发射一发炮弹，致盲并点燃逃离: Replaces your dodge roll with an explosive-assisted leap, firing off a round from your prosthetic cannon leg that Blinds and Ignites enemies in the area you escape from. The explosion will cause any Grenades in its area of effect to also explode.
desc.通过为技能消耗魔力来获得燃料，然后使用积累的燃料从手中召唤火焰洪流，点燃你前方的: Gain fuel by spending Mana on any Skill, then use the accumulated fuel to conjure a torrent of Fire from your hand, Igniting enemies in front of you. The flames grow stronger the longer you Channel. Consumes a Fire Infusion if possible to also create Ignited Ground. Cannot gain fuel while using this skill.
desc.从地面挖出熔岩并将其抛向目标。投射物在碰撞时爆炸，对敌人造成伤害，并敌人身后的锥: Gouge molten rock from the ground and fling it at the target. The Projectile explodes on collision, damaging enemies and scattering shrapnel in a cone behind it.
desc.激活时，释放一个光环，持续对在场的敌人施加暴击弱点。: While active, emits an Aura that continuously inflicts Critical Weakness on enemies in your Presence.
desc.激活时，一头九头蛇会从你的身体上站起，并定期对附近感电、冻结和点燃的敌人施放镶嵌: While active, a companion Hydra will rear up from your body and regularly cast socketed Projectile Spells at nearby Shocked, Frozen, and Ignited enemies.
desc.对敌人施加重度晕眩来累积荣耀。荣耀达到满值后，你可以祈求先祖碾碎你的敌人，显化一: Build Glory by Heavy Stunning enemies. When you have maximum Glory you may entreat the Ancestors to crush your enemies, manifesting a massive hammer that falls from the sky onto your target, Slamming into the ground after a short duration and dealing immense damage based on your weapon.
desc.在敌人体内种下火焰种子。对敌人造成足够伤害或直接将其击败会使种子爆炸，在区域内造: Plant a seed of Fire inside an enemy. Dealing enough damage to the enemy, or killing it outright, causes the seed to explode, dealing damage in an area and leaving behind a Fire Infusion Remnant.
desc.在敌人心脏上种下一颗深渊能量种子。对敌人造成足量的伤害，或直接将其击杀，会使其心: Plant a seed of Abyssal Energy on the enemy's heart. Dealing enough damage to the enemy, or killing it outright, causes their heart to explode, dealing Physical damage in an area.
desc.向前冲锋，踩裂大地，每一步都会留下一片崎岖之地。冲锋结束时施展跳跃猛击，对敌人造: Charges forward, cracking the earth and leaving a patch of Jagged Ground with every footstep. At the end of your charge, a massive leaping Slam damages enemies and causes all nearby patches of Jagged Ground to explode, damaging enemies standing on them. Once you begin your charge, the use speed of this Skill is affected by movement speed instead of Attack speed.
desc.将盾牌砸向地面，竖起一道土墙。敌人可以攻击你的墙体段落，你的猛击、战吼和重盾冲锋: Ram your Shield into the ground, throwing up a wall of earth. Enemies can attack your wall segments, and your Slams, Warcries, and Shield Charge will instantly shatter them all. The segments explode when shattered, damaging enemies in front of and around them.
desc.发出战吼获得防卫，并使后续的盾牌攻击造成伤害时触发盾护冲击波。消耗一个耐力球可以: Perform a Warcry that grants Guard and Triggers Shield Wave when subsequent Shield Attacks deal damage. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.
desc.召唤出一团炽热的余烬在你头顶盘旋。短暂时间后，余烬会向敌人发射，在击中区域造成火: Conjure a blazing Ember that hovers above you. After a short duration, the Ember launches at an enemy, dealing Fire damage in an area on impact and prioritising the last enemy targeted. Recasting this spell resets the duration for all active Embers. Multiple Embers fired in the same Fusillade will attempt to target different enemies. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to cause the entire Fusillade to create beams that Chain to enemies.
desc.召唤出一团作响的魂井之灵在你头顶盘旋。短暂时间后，魂井之灵会向敌人发射，在击中区: Conjure a crackling Wellsprite that hovers above you. After a short duration, the Wellsprite launches at an enemy, dealing Lightning damage in an area on impact and prioritising the last enemy targeted. Recasting this spell resets the duration for all active Wellsprites.
desc.被动地凝聚一道防护性屏障，吸收你受到的击中元素伤害直至耗尽。屏障停止受到伤害或完: Passively manifests a protective barrier which takes Elemental Damage from Hits for you until depleted. The barrier instantly recharges to its full value a short time after it stops taking damage or is fully depleted.
desc.汲取敌人的鲜血以回复你的生命。激活时，被你击败的敌人有几率生成一个生命残片，击中: Drink the blood of your enemies to restore your Life. While active, enemies you kill have a chance to spawn a Life Remnant, and Hitting a target spawns a Life Remnant every few seconds. Picking up a Life Remnant grants you Life which can Overflow maximum Life.
desc.发射一支充能了闪电的箭矢，会追踪受到闪电异常状态影响的敌人。击中此类敌人时，箭矢: Fire a Lightning-charged arrow that homes in on enemies afflicted by Lightning Ailments. Hitting such an enemy will cause your arrow to release a damaging shockwave and Chain towards nearby targets, with those Chaining Hits also releasing a shockwave. After the final Chain, the arrow lodges into the ground as a Lightning Rod. Consumes Shock from enemies it Hits, but not Electrocution.
desc.向前跃起并猛击地面，发出冲击波。冲击波对恍惚敌人施加破碎姿态，使对这些敌人的任何: Leap forward and Slam the ground, sending out a shockwave. The shockwave applies Broken Stance to Dazed enemies, causing any Hits against those enemies to deal extra damage.
desc.将节杖扫出，在你前方的地面上射出一道闪电裂隙。: Sweep your Quarterstaff, projecting a bolt of Lightning through the ground in a long fissure ahead of you.
desc.成功使用其他技能打击敌人可以积累连击。达到连击上限后，使用此技能可以强化你的下一:
Build Combo by successfully Striking Enemies with other skills. After reaching maximum Combo, use this skill to Empower your next Quarterstaff Attack, causing it to deal additional Chaos damage. Each kill with the Empowered Attack grants
Purple Flames of Chayula for a duration.
desc.召唤生物的钙质护盾爆炸，对附近的敌人造成物理伤害。: The minion's shield of bone explodes, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies.
desc.消耗魔力药剂的充能，投掷一个爆炸瓶，在一片区域内造成火焰攻击伤害。会向附近点燃的: Consume charges from your Mana Flask to throw a flask that explodes, dealing Fire Attack damage in an area. Additional smaller flasks are thrown at nearby Ignited Enemies. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an Unarmed Attack
desc.消耗魔力药剂的充能，投掷一个爆炸药剂，在一片区域内造成闪电攻击伤害，高几率感电。: Consume charges from your Mana Flask to throw a flask that explodes, dealing Lightning Attack damage in an area with high chance to Shock. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an Unarmed Attack
desc.消耗魔力药剂的充能，投掷一个爆炸药剂，在一片区域内造成冰霜攻击伤害，并施加曝露。: Consume charges from your Mana Flask to throw a flask that explodes, dealing Cold Attack damage in an area and inflicting Exposure. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an Unarmed Attack
desc.消耗魔力药剂的充能，投掷一个爆炸药剂，在一片区域内造成物理攻击伤害。投掷的药剂瓶: Consume charges from your Mana Flask to throw a flask that explodes, dealing Physical Attack damage in an area. The thrown flask Consumes Poison on Hit to cause an acidic burst. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an Unarmed Attack
desc.消耗魔力药剂的充能，投掷一个爆炸药剂，在一片区域内造成物理攻击伤害，对击中的敌人: Consume charges from your Mana Flask to throw a flask that explodes, dealing Physical Attack damage in an area and Aggravating Bleeding on Enemies hit. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an Unarmed Attack
desc.产生一次剧烈爆炸、一道闪电弧，或者一道投射物冰霜波。爆炸的触发几率与你的力量成正: Create a fiery explosion, an arcing bolt of lightning, or an icy wave of projectiles. The chance for an explosion is proportional to your Strength, for a bolt proportional to your Dexterity, and for a wave proportional to your Intelligence.
desc.给一个目标施加印记，使其更容易受到冻结。当被施加印记的目标被冻结时，该印记将激活: Mark a target, making them more susceptible to being Frozen. When the Marked target is Frozen, the Mark Activates, granting you a Buff which gives extra Cold damage and Consuming the Mark. Marking another target while you have the Buff will remove the Buff.
desc.给一个目标施加印记，使其更容易受到触电。当被施加印记的目标处于触电状态时，该印记: Mark a target, making them more susceptible to being Electrocuted. When the Marked target is Electrocuted, the Mark Activates, granting a Buff which gives extra Lightning damage and Consuming the Mark. Marking another target while you have the Buff will remove the Buff.
desc.击中对敌人造成元素异常状态时，获得不羁狂怒。当你的不羁狂怒达到上限时，消耗它获得: Gain Unbound Fury by inflicting Elemental Ailments with Hits on enemies. Once you reach maximum Unbound Fury, consume it to become Unbound for a duration, vastly augmenting your Elemental prowess.
desc.冲向一名敌人并发起打击，以增强效果触发镶嵌的印记，以增强持续时间施加镶嵌的诅咒。: Dash to an enemy and Strike them, triggering socketed Marks with increased effect and applying socketed Curses with increased duration.
desc.施放冻结周围空气的力量之语，将附近的敌人包裹在寒冰碎片中。对这些敌人造成足量伤害: DNT-UNUSED Manifest words of power that freeze the air around you, coating nearby enemies in shards of ice. Dealing enough damage to these enemies will shatter the shards, causing an icy explosion that deals Attack damage which is not based on your Weapon.
desc.操控时间，重置你的其他技能的冷却时间。: Manipulate time, resetting the cooldowns of your other Skills.
desc.释放出一道巨大的冲击波，在持续时间内冻结所有受影响敌人的时间。敌人被时间停止的次: Release a large wave that stops time for all affected enemies for a duration. Duration is lower the more times the enemy has had time stopped for them.
desc.变形成一个恶魔，大幅增强你的法术。处于恶魔形态下时，你每秒都会获得魔焰焚身，使你: Shapeshift into a demon, vastly boosting the power of your Spells. You gain Demonflame every second you remain in demon form, causing your Life to be lost at an ever-increasing rate. Maximum 10 Demonflame. Revert to human form if you reach 1 Life, use a Skill that isn't a Spell, or reactivate this Skill.
desc.激活时，攻击敌人会积蓄荣耀。当你达到最大荣耀时，你可以放置一面鼓舞旗帜，持续一段: While active, Attacking enemies builds Glory. When you have maximum Glory, you can place an inspiring Banner for a duration with an Aura that grants you and nearby Allies Attack damage, Attack speed and Accuracy.

While active, Attacking enemies builds Glory. When you have maximum Glory, you can place an inspiring Banner for a duration with an Aura that grants you and nearby Allies Armour, Evasion and movement speed.

While active, Attacking enemies builds Glory. When you have maximum Glory, you can place an inspiring Banner for a duration with an Aura that grants you and nearby Allies Elemental Ailment Threshold, Maximum Elemental Resistances and Flask charges.
desc.激活时，周期性地祈求祝福对你进行治疗，并移除你受到的诅咒和元素异常状态效果。: While active, periodically invokes divine blessings to heal you and remove Curses and Elemental Ailments from you.
desc.消耗所有青玉护身层数，每消耗一层青玉护身，获得基于最大生命的防卫。具有防卫时无法: Consume all stacks of Jade to grant Guard based off your maximum Life for each Jade consumed. You cannot gain Jade stacks while you have Guard.
desc.激活时，来自平行时间线的分身会偶尔出现。这些分身会从你的首个有效的武器组中，施放: While active, visages of yourself from alternate timelines will occasionally appear and cast one of your Spells from your first valid Weapon Set. Until the next visage appears, your next cast of the same Spell aligns your fate, Empowering that Spell. Visages can only cast damaging, non-Channelling, non-Buff Spells you could cast that have no cooldown.
desc.释放一道时空新星，利用敌人的脆弱瞬间。击中处于可被晕眩、可被触电或可被冻结状态的: Send out a temporal Nova to take advantage of enemies' moment of vulnerability. Hitting enemies that are Primed for Stun, Electrocution, or Freeze causes a visage of them to appear, lasting as long as the original target would have been affected by the form of Immobilisation used to create the visage. A portion of the damage dealt to visages is also dealt to the original.
desc.每次召唤图腾时都会触发该技能，召唤一个先祖之灵召唤生物为你作战。如果图腾被击败，: This skill is Triggered each time you summon a Totem, summoning an Ancestral Spirit Minion to fight for you. If the Totem dies then the Ancestral Spirit triggered by it's summoning will die too.
desc.激活时，当你对敌人造成冻结、感电或点燃时都会获得能量。积累一定的能量后再次使用该: While active, gains Energy when you Freeze, Shock or Ignite an enemy. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to trigger socketed Spells, and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough Energy.
desc.在你身旁创造出一道裂隙，使你能够看见附近的夏乌拉之焰。该技能激活时，你被视作处于: Create a Breach around you, allowing you to see nearby Flames of Chayula. You are considered to be in a Breach while this skill is active.
desc.激活时，你与稀有和传奇敌人交战的时间越长，对他们造成的击中伤害就越高。战斗时间达: While active, causes you to deal more Hit damage to Rare and Unique enemies the longer you've been fighting them, and gain Culling Strike against them once you've been fighting them for long enough.
desc.运用难以预测、原生纯粹的元素力量洪流，使你造成的随机一种元素的伤害大幅提高。受影: Tap into a current of raw and unpredictable Elemental power, causing you to deal greatly more damage of a randomly chosen Element. The Element affected changes frequently, though the same Element can be affected multiple times in succession.
desc.立即装填你所有的战弩弹药匣并强化每个箭匣的弹药，在一段时间内造成更多伤害。: Instantly reload all your Crossbow Ammunition clips and Empower each clip's Ammunition to deal more damage for a duration.
desc.发射一枚弹跳的榴弹，引线燃尽时爆炸，射出一圈在延迟后爆炸的小型榴弹，落地时发生爆: Fire a bouncing Grenade that explodes when its fuse expires, throwing out a ring of mini Grenades that explode when they come to a stop.
desc.激活时，你会根据激活的能量球而获得强大的增益状态。然而，维持增益状态时每隔几秒都: While active, you gain powerful Buffs based on your active Charges. However, maintaining the Buff Consumes Charges every few seconds.
desc.技能激活时，消耗敌人身上的冻结、感电、点燃或护甲完全破损效果会重新装填你的战弩、: While active, Consuming Freeze, Shock, Ignite, or Fully Broken Armour on an enemy reloads your Crossbow, restores one cooldown use for your Grenades and grants a Buff causing Crossbow Attacks to not consume bolts for a duration. This can only occur once every few seconds.
desc.激活时，释放一个光环，使在场的敌人更容易受到晕眩和元素异常状态影响。: While active, emits an Aura that makes enemies in your Presence easier to Stun and inflict Elemental Ailments upon.
desc.激活时，你会被动获得药剂充能，并且药剂的生命和魔力回复也会对在场的友军生效。: While active, grants you Flask charges passively and causes Life and Mana recovery from your Flasks to also apply to Allies in your Presence.
desc.激活时，当你用近战攻击击败敌人时都会获得能量。积累一定的能量后再次使用该咒祈，即: While active, gains Energy when you kill an enemy with a Melee Attack. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to trigger socketed Spells, and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough Energy.
desc.激活时，你的可复活的亡灵召唤生物能够替代技能使用的灵柩，但召唤生物的复活速度会减: While active, your undead Reviving Minions can be used in place of Corpses by your skills, but your Minions Revive more slowly.
desc.激活时，根据你的魔力上限，你的非吟唱法术会消耗额外的魔力，并造成额外的闪电伤害。: While active, causes your Non-Channelling Spells to cost additional mana and deal extra Lightning damage, both based on your maximum Mana.
desc.产生点燃地面将敌人点燃，效果取决于你的魔力上限的一定比例。: Create Ignited Ground Igniting Enemies based on a percentage of your Maximum Mana.
desc.瞄准天空，发射能量飞弹，落向其他闪电攻击在你前方残留的弩箭或箭矢。飞弹落在残留的: Aim skyward and fire energy missiles at lingering bolts or arrows created by other Lightning Attacks in front of you. The missiles explode if they land close to a lingering bolt or arrow, dealing more damage in a larger area but destroying that bolt or arrow in the process.
desc.被动随时间获得封印。使用该技能时发射一个投射物，并打破封印，每层封印以及技能赋予: Passively gains Seals over time. Using the skill fires a projectile, and breaks the Seals, Repeating for each of them, and for each additional projectile the skill is given. For each time it Repeats normally, it will also Repeat an additional time targeting a different Ice Fragment in its area of effect if able, Detonating those Ice Fragments immediately.
desc.激活时，强化你的怒火，但在未失去怒火时使你损失生命。: While active, strengthens your Rage, but causes you to lose Life while not losing Rage.
desc.激活时，击败中毒的敌人会将其中毒效果扩散给周围的其他敌人，并有几率使他们缓速。: While active, killing a Poisoned enemy spreads its Poison to other nearby enemies, and has a chance to also Hinder them.
desc.激活时，击败失血的敌人会产生一次赤血爆炸，对周围的敌人造成物理攻击伤害。此伤害不: While active, killing an enemy with Blood Loss will cause a bloody explosion that deals Physical Attack damage to surrounding enemies. This damage is not based on your Weapon, but is partially based on their accumulated Blood Loss. The explosion destroys their Corpse if the enemy was Normal or Magic, and has a chance to Aggravate Bleeding.
desc.激活时，释放一个光环，周期性地对在场的敌人施加死亡凋零。: While active, emits an Aura that periodically Withers enemies in your Presence.
desc.激活且有敌人在场时，虫群会从你体内涌出追击附近敌人。虫群是无法被攻击的召唤生物，: While active and enemies are present, swarms of insects emerge from your body to pursue nearby enemies. The swarms are untargetable Minions that Attack and Poison enemies.
desc.激活时，发动远程投射物攻击将创造一个幻影，该幻影在短时间内使用已镶嵌的远程攻击技: While active, firing a ranged Projectile Attack will create a Mirage that uses socketed ranged Attacks for a short duration, then vanish.
desc.激活时，闪避翻滚会创造一个幻影，该幻影在短时间内使用已镶嵌的远程攻击技能，随后消: While active, dodge rolling will create a Mirage that uses socketed ranged Attacks for a short duration, then vanish.
desc.激活时，你对敌人造成冻结、触电或定身时获得一个狂怒球。此效果每隔几秒只能触发一次: While active, grants you a Frenzy Charge when you Freeze, Electrocute or Pin an enemy. This can only occur once every few seconds.
desc.激活时，当你格挡时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的使法术。: While active, gains Energy when you Block and triggers socketed Spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，当你格挡时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的诅咒。: While active, gains Energy when you Block and triggers socketed Curses on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.向后翻腾并持续吟唱，为你的节杖注入闪电之力。释放时冲向目标位置，对沿途的敌人造成: Flip backward and Channel to charge your Quarterstaff with Lightning. Releasing dashes towards the target location, damaging enemies along the way. Releasing with Perfect Timing performs a Lightning-assisted dash that releases shockwaves from enemies you dash through. Perfectly Timed dash also explodes Tempest Bells on hit creating a shockwave that deals more damage and has a larger area, leaving Shocked Ground in its wake. This skill cannot be Ancestrally Boosted.
desc.牺牲一个稀有怪物的灵柩，使你在一段时间内获得其词缀。也可消耗自身的生命力，随机获: Sacrifice the Corpse of a Rare Monster to grant you its Modifiers for a duration, or gain a single random Modifier at the cost of your own life force.
desc.在场的敌人周期性地积累沸腾，被击败时产生爆发，对周围的敌人施加腐化之血。: Enemies in your Presence accumulate blood boils periodically. When they die, the boils pop applying Corrupted Blood to enemies near them.
desc.重踏你的战矛，引爆你在场范围内每个敌人身上的所有血石长矛，在该敌人周围引发伤害性: Stamp your spear, destroying all Bloodstone Lances on each enemy in your Presence to cause a damaging explosion around that enemy. Each explosion gains new benefits when reaching higher thresholds of Bloodstone Lances removed from an enemy, causing them to deal more damage, have increased area of effect, and Leech Life from enemies caught in the blast.
desc.召唤雄鹿之灵，令其向前跃出。每只雄鹿每次落地时，都会释放一道造成伤害的冲击波。任: Call upon Spirits of the Stag, sending them leaping forward. Each Stag releases a damaging shockwave each time it lands, and any Stags that travel the maximum possible distance also leave behind Shocked Ground.
desc.召唤一个熊灵伙伴撕咬你的敌人。熊灵会扑向敌人使其瘫痪，通过猛击偷取生命，并周期性: Call upon a Bear Spirit Companion to maul your foes. The Bear Spirit leaps at enemies to Maim them, Leeches Life with its slam, and periodically roars to Intimidate enemies. The Bear Spirit does not count toward your Companion limit.
desc.持续吟唱以在目标位置附近创造出你星界自我的短暂影像。影像会执行一次已镶嵌的近战攻: Channel to create fleeting images of your astral self near the target location. The images perform a Socketed Melee Attack once then vanish, targeting the closest enemy if possible. The images cannot perform Channelled Skills or Conditional Skills. Consuming a Power Charge creates additional images.
desc.激活时，灵体铃铛会定期出现在你附近。你的击中会立即摧毁铃铛，产生一道冲击波，对附: While active, ethereal bells periodically appear near you. Your Hits immediately destroy the bells, creating a shockwave that damages nearby enemies and causes a Heavy Stun on enemies that are Primed for Stun. The bells are themselves always Primed for Stun, they can be Culled, and Hits against them are always Critical Hits.
desc.将一个灵体铃铛附着在你的背上。使用其他技能造成暴击时，会使铃铛鸣响，对附近敌人造: Attaches an ethereal bell to your back. Critical Hits with other Skills will cause the bell to ring out, damaging nearby enemies.
desc.每隔几秒对附近未被施加印记的敌人施加一个镶嵌的印记技能。消耗镶嵌的印记会使其重新: Applies a socketed Mark Skill to a nearby unmarked Enemy every few seconds. Consuming socketed Marks will cause them to be reapplied to an unmarked Enemy. This reapplication can happen at most once every few seconds.
desc.根据被击败的定身目标的生命上限，造成物理范围伤害。: Deal Physical Area Damage based off of the maximum Life of the Pinned target slain.
desc.根据触发该爆炸的目标的护甲破损效果，造成物理范围伤害。: Deal Physical Area Damage based off of the Broken Armour of the target which this explosion was Triggered from.
desc.被敌人触发时造成瘫痪和攻击范围伤害。触发时摧毁铁蒺藜，同一时间最多只能激活 20: Maims and deals Attack area damage when triggered by an Enemy. Caltrops are destroyed when triggered, and a maximum of 20 Caltrops can be active at once.
desc.根据消耗的流血效果的预期伤害，在区域内造成一定比例的物理伤害。: Deal Physical Damage in an Area based on a percentage of the expected Damage of the Consumed Bleeding.
desc.在一定范围内造成荆棘伤害，无法击中触发该效果的目标。: Deal your Thorns Damage in an Area. Cannot Hit the target this was Triggered from.
desc.从被击中的目标处发射熔火投射物，落在周围并造成范围攻击伤害。: Fire molten Projectiles from the struck target, which will land nearby dealing Attack damage in an area.
desc.危害性的荆刺，对与其接触的敌人造成伤害和瘫痪。: Hazardous thorns damage and Maim enemies with which they come in contact.
desc.将静电脉冲附着于目标，对附着目标及其周围敌人造成持续脉冲闪电伤害。最多可以给目标: Attaches a Static Shock to a target that pulses Lightning damage to the attached target and nearby enemies. Targets can have a maximum of one Static Shock attached to them.
desc.依据图腾生命值在区域内造成物理伤害。: Deals Physical Damage in an area, based on Totem Life.
desc.大力掷出一柄战矛，在落点掀起一阵旋风，使效果范围内的敌人减速和致盲。进入旋风会使: Throw a Spear with enough force to kick up a Whirlwind where it lands, Slowing enemies and Blinding them in its area of effect. Entering the Whirlwind collapses it, dealing damage and causing Knockback. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if possible to create the Whirlwind with one more than its normal maximum number of stages.
desc.消耗所有狂怒球，发起一次巨型战矛突刺并击退敌人。每消耗一个狂怒球，就会有一条腾蛇: Consume all Frenzy Charges to perform a gigantic spear thrust that Knocks Back enemies. For each Frenzy Charge consumed, a Wind Serpent follows in the spear's wake. Each Serpent also damages and Knocks Back enemies.
desc.冲向一名敌人并发起裂伤挥斩，对击中的所有敌人造成流血。: Dash towards an enemy and perform a lacerating slash, inflicting Bleeding on all enemies struck.
desc.为一个目标添加印记，使其在失血时获得重度晕眩积蓄。当该目标被重度晕眩时，或者当其: Mark a target, making them suffer Heavy Stun build up from Blood Loss. The Mark will Activate, Consuming itself to Trigger Blood Explosion, when they are Heavy Stunned, or when they are killed if they suffered enough Blood Loss. The Mark's duration does not expire while the Marked target is suffering Blood Loss.
desc.猛烈的赤血爆炸会造成物理攻击伤害，但此伤害不基于你的武器伤害。: A violent explosion of blood that deals Physical Attack damage which is not based on your Weapon's damage.
desc.召唤阿兹莫里的鬼灵在一段时间里环绕一个稀有野兽，使其缓速。如果你在鬼灵环绕期间击: Conjure Azmeri wisps to engulf a Rare Beast for a duration, Hindering them. If you defeat the Beast while it is engulfed in wisps, it will be captured by this gem, transforming the gem to instead allow you to summon the Beast as a Reviving Companion.
desc.对敌人施加冻结, 感电或点燃来累积荣耀。荣耀达到满值后，你可以呼唤阿兹莫里的日耀: Build Glory by inflicting Freeze, Shock or Ignite on enemies. When you have maximum Glory you may call forth the Azmeri goddess Solaris, jumping backwards and throwing your Spear in the air. On landing the spear deals heavy damage in an area, then calls a divine skybeam that pulses periodically and creates expanding Ignited Ground. Modifiers to number of Projectiles fired do not apply to this skill.
desc.掷出一柄电化战矛并嵌入地面，周期性地用闪电震击周围的敌人。如果战矛被其他技能引爆: Throw an electrified Spear that lodges in the ground and periodically zaps nearby enemies with Lightning bolts. If the Spear is Detonated by another Skill, it immediately unleashes a volley of bolts and expires. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if possible to fire bolts more frequently for a shorter duration, automatically Detonate at the end of its duration, and create Shocked Ground on Detonation.
desc.举起轻盾招架下一次击中，格挡该次击中，并以迅猛的横扫进行反击，使敌人失去平衡，使: Ready your Buckler to parry the next Hit you would take, Blocking the Hit and retaliating with a quick sweep that leaves enemies off balance, causing them to take massively increased Attack damage for a short duration. Parrying causes you to accumulate Heavy Stun buildup. You cannot Evade a Hit you could parry, but Evasion instead grants an equal chance to avoid this Heavy Stun buildup.
desc.把握敌人失衡的时机，趁势发起寒冰戳刺。击中被招架的目标会消耗该减益状态，产生寒冰: Perform an icy stab that exploits enemies who are already off balance. Hitting a Parried target Consumes the Debuff to cause an explosion of frost and leave Chilled Ground.
desc.将战矛刺入大地并释放一股脉冲，消耗周围多个敌人、友军和灵柩的冻结、感电和点燃。脉: Plunge your Spear into the ground to emit a pulse that Consumes Freeze, Shock and Ignite on a number of nearby enemies, Allies and Corpses. The pulse itself deals no damage, but each Ailment Consumed causes an explosion of the corresponding elemental damage type.
desc.召唤一个可复活的野兽伙伴协助你作战。: Summon a Reviving Beast Companion to aid you in combat.
desc.激活时，当你使用咒符时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的使法术。: While active, gains Energy when one of your Charms is used and triggers socketed Spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.与所有元素协同如一，根据你的击中造成的最高元素伤害类型，积蓄火焰、冰霜和闪电亲和: Become attuned to all Elements building up Fire, Cold and Lightning Affinity based off the highest Elemental Damage type dealt by your Hits. Your Elemental Damage is enhanced the more Affinity of any type you have.
desc.投掷一柄穿透战矛，在其轨迹上留下冰霜碎片。碎片对附近敌人施加冰缓。若可能消耗一个: Throw a single Piercing lance that leaves icy fragments in its wake. The fragments Chill nearby enemies. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if possible to cause the glacial fragments created by the first Projectile to explode outwards after a short duration, peppering enemies with shrapnel.
desc.发动一次充满闪电之力的刺击，可放出最多三段连招。前两次攻击若击中带有感电的敌人，: Perform a Lightning-charged stab that can be chained into a combination of up to three attacks. The first two attacks conjure a charging Wildwood spirit if they Hit a Shocked enemy and refresh Shock duration. The third attack is a large swipe that inflicts Elemental Exposure, and can Consume Shock to conjure a stampede of spirits.
desc.冲刺并刺穿敌人，若其生命足够低则触发终结。若此攻击至少击败一名敌人，将为你提供一: Dash to an enemy and run them through, Culling enemies if their life is low enough. If this Attack kills at least one enemy, it grants you a Frenzy Charge, with higher Rarity monsters granting additional Charges. Enemies around you that can be Culled will be highlighted.
desc.使你的武器获得涌动效果。该武器的非近战投射物攻击会消耗涌动，使发射的投射物在飞行: Grants your weapon Surges. Non-Melee Projectile Attacks with that weapon Consume Surges to cause the Projectiles fired to explode at the end of their flight.
desc.激活时，你在闪避翻滚时会在身后抛下铁蒺藜。: While active, scatters caltrops in your wake when you dodge.
desc.激活时，当你使用近战攻击击中敌人时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的闪电法术。: While active, gains Energy when you Hit enemies with Melee Attacks and triggers socketed Lightning spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.激活时，当你使用近战攻击击中敌人时会获得能量，达到能量上限后触发镶嵌的火焰法术。: While active, gains Energy when you Hit enemies with Melee Attacks and triggers socketed Fire spells on reaching maximum Energy.
desc.显化主手近战战斗武器的复制体，使其作为不朽的伙伴协助你作战。除了基础打击外，显化: Manifest a copy of your main hand Melee Martial Weapon as an immortal Companion to fight by your side. In addition to its standard Strikes, the Manifested Weapon gains an additional Attack depending on its weapon type.
desc.招募炮兵召唤生物在你的身后就位。他们会等待你发出命令，随后向目标位置射出箭雨。: Recruit artillery Minions that take up positions behind you. They will lie in wait for your Command, then fire volleys of arrows at the target location.
desc.向目标位置发射一枚信号弹，落在敌人处时附着在其身上，随后以信号弹为中心发射一连串: Fires a flare at a target location, attaching to an enemy if it lands on one, then launches a series of arrow volleys centred around the flare.
desc.命令你的部分鸦群冲破一组幻镜，以频繁的击中攻击幻镜之间区域内的敌人。: Command part of your flock to leave and crash through a set of illusory mirrors, Attacking enemies in the area between the mirrors with frequent Hits.
desc.持续吟唱以淬炼你的主手近战战斗武器。锤子每次击打铁砧都会强化后续的攻击，使其在击: Channel to temper your main hand Melee Martial Weapon. Each hit of the hammer against the anvil Empowers subsequent Attacks to Combust when Hitting enemies.
desc.爆炸，造成范围火焰伤害。: Explode, dealing Fire damage in an area.
desc.激活时，获得一个技能，可以使能量护盾立即开始充能，并获得一个持续一段时间的增益状: While active, grants a skill that you can use to instantly begin Recharging Energy Shield and gain a Buff for a duration that prevents that Recharge being interrupted. The Buff is removed at maximum Energy Shield and the skill cannot be used while Energy Shield is full.
desc.指示你的有鳍伙伴吃掉另一名玩家的宠物。: Direct your finned companion to feast upon another player's pet.
desc.变形为双足飞龙，挥动翼尖利爪对前方大范围发动扫击。若可能则消耗一个暴击球，为你带: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and perform a wide slash with your wingtip claws. Consumes a Power Charge if possible to grant you a Buff that gives you extra Lightning damage. While you have the Buff, Rend covers a much larger area but is slower.
desc.变形为双足飞龙，借助强力的振翅向后腾跃，对敌人造成击退。可被晕眩的敌人将遭受重度: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and launch yourself backwards with a powerful wingbeat that Knocks Back enemies. Enemies Primed for Heavy Stun will be stunned, release a shockwave, and have a chance to grant you a Power Charge. This skill can be used while using other skills to interrupt them.
desc.创造一只短暂跳跃的蟾蜍，随后蟾蜍爆炸，对范围内造成攻击伤害并施加中毒。该技能造成: This skill creates a toad that jumps around briefly, then explodes the toad, dealing Attack damage in an area and inflicting Poison.  Damage you deal with skill is not based on your Weapon
desc.命令纳薇拉制造一个气泡护盾，可吸收位于护盾外的敌人所造成伤害的一部分。护盾可吸收: Command Navira to create a bubble shield which absorbs a portion of the damage dealt by enemies standing outside the shield. The maximum amount of damage that can be absorbed is based on your maximum Mana. If the shield is destroyed by damage, it collapses into a patch of Chilled Ground.
desc.命令纳薇拉碎裂所有附近有敌人站立其上的冰缓地面区域，造成高额法术伤害并附带极高的: Command Navira to fracture all nearby areas of Chilled Ground that have enemies standing on them, doing high Spell damage with extreme Freeze potential.
desc.命令纳薇拉将附近的冰缓地面转化为纳薇拉绿洲，这是一片幻景，可为你和身处其中的友军: Command Navira to turn nearby Chilled Ground into Navira's Oasis, a mirage which grants you and Allies standing in it Flask charges and damage Recouped as Life and Mana. Plants in the area become Overgrown.
desc.命令凯拉里向目标地点投掷一连串匕首。匕首将钻入地下，短暂延迟后从地底喷发出来，造: Command Kelari to throw a volley of knives at the target location. The knives burrow into the ground, then erupt into the air after a short delay, dealing Spell damage.
desc.命令凯拉里在目标位置引发一次造成法术伤害的爆发，并留下一个持续短暂时间的分身。该: Command Kelari to create a blast at the target location that deals Spell damage, and leave behind a clone that persists for a short duration. This skill can store multiple charges, and using it again while a clone from a previous use is still alive causes that clone to explode, dealing even more damage.
desc.持续吟唱并命令凯拉里与你一同持续吟唱，在目标位置上方凝聚悬浮的刀刃。你的持续吟唱: Channel and Command Kelari to Channel alongside you, creating blades that hang over the target location. The longer you Channel, the more blades Kelari will create. Upon release, his blades plunge into the ground and create shockwaves that deal Spell damage.
desc.命令鲁詹在敌人身上烙下一个火焰印记。该印记将在短暂延迟后或受到引爆时爆炸，对爆炸: Command Ruzhan to place a fiery brand on an enemy. After a delay or when Detonated, the brand explodes, dealing Spell damage to enemies caught in the blast.
desc.命令鲁詹投掷其巨剑，在落地点散布危险的符文。若有敌人踩到符文，将爆发出造成法术伤: Command Ruzhan to hurl his greatsword, spreading hazardous runes on the ground where it lands. If an enemy steps on a rune, it erupts in a fiery tornado that deals Spell damage.
desc.命令鲁詹传送至目标地点。抵达时，巨灵将对周围敌人造成法术伤害，随后用其燃烧的巨剑: Command Ruzhan to teleport to the target location. Upon arrival, the Djinn deals Spell damage to enemies around him then slams his blazing sword into the ground, creating a wave of lava that also deals Spell damage.
desc.命令鲁詹凝聚两波炽热余烬，并将其向前发射。余烬在撞击时爆炸，造成法术伤害。: Command Ruzhan to conjure two volleys of flaming embers and fire them forward. The embers explode on impact, dealing Spell damage.
desc.每当你使用伤害技能时，鲁詹会以狂热的姿态出现在你的目标附近，对敌人发动打击，并施: When you use a damaging Skill, Ruzhan emerges to Strike enemies near your target with zealous fervour, inflicting Exposure.
desc.变形为双足飞龙，向敌人喷吐黏油，在投射物的落点生成黏油地面。若可能则消耗一个暴击: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and spit Oil at enemies, creating Oil Ground where the Projectiles land. Consumes Power Charges if possible to instead Channel a sustained barrage of electrified Oil that does not create Oil Ground. Projectiles are fired in sequence, allowing multiple Projectiles to Hit the same target.
desc.激活时，储存被你的护甲或其他伤害减免来源阻挡的物理伤害的一定百分比。使用此技能会: While active, stores a percentage of the Physical damage that is prevented by your Armour or other sources of damage reduction. Using this Skill releases the stored damage as a nova of spikes.
desc.变形为双足飞龙并腾空，以火焰灼烧敌人。持续吟唱会在短时间内结束，但可通过消耗怒火: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and take to the skies, immolating enemies with a jet of fire. Channelling ends after a short amount of time but can be prolonged by spending Rage. Consumes a Power Charge if possible to Empower the Skill, Gaining extra Lightning damage and spending Rage more slowly.
desc.召唤藤蔓向前爬行，沿途对敌人造成伤害。藤蔓存在期间会抽打并附着于附近敌人，造成伤: Conjures a rootbound fissure that crawls forward, damaging enemies in its path. While the fissure persists, vines lash out from it and attach to nearby enemies, damaging and Slowing them.
desc.变形为狼人，挥出一连串爪击。首次攻击可冲刺至远处敌人，末次攻击将连续打击两次。攻: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and lash out with a flurry of claw swipes. The first Attack can dash to faraway enemies and the final Attack Strikes twice. Attacking a Frozen enemy will create Ice Fragments, which are Projectiles that land and explode after a short delay.
desc.变形为巨熊，连续重击地面，在前方大范围弧形区域内生成随机游走的熔岩裂缝。: Shapeshift into a Bear and repeatedly pound the ground, creating Molten Fissures that travel randomly in a wide arc in front of you.
desc.给一个目标施加印记，使其承受的伤害提高，增幅取决于目标周围敌人数量。若目标死亡，: Mark a target, causing it to take increased damage based on how many of the target's enemies are near to it. If the target dies, the Mark will Activate to Trigger the Summon Wolf skill and Consume the Mark.
desc.变形为狼人，向后腾跃的同时用双爪刨抓地面。双爪可分别命中敌人。若以双爪击中同一个: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and leap backwards as you gouge the ground with both claws. Enemies can be Hit separately by both gouges. Hitting a Marked enemy with both gouges will Activate the Mark and cause an additional shockwave. Ice Fragments will be pulled into the location where the gouges cross and explode immediately. This skill can be used while using other skills to interrupt them.
desc.消耗所有暴击球，掌控元素之力，获得元素伤害并使你的其他伤害类型可附带元素异常状态: Consume all Power Charges to master the elements, gaining Elemental Damage and the ability to apply Elemental Ailments with other damage types. Can only be used while you have maximum Power Charges.
desc.释放一连串痛苦洪流轰炸目标区域，造成范围伤害。不会消耗弹药，在镇魂曲结束前可无限: Unleashes a torrent of anguish that bombard the target area, dealing damage in an area on impact. Does not use Ammunition and can be fired freely until the Requiem ends.
desc.你的武器中会向其中的受难之魂缓慢灌注痛苦。蓄满后可施放该技能，谱写镇魂曲，将你的: Your weapon passively accumulates anguish from the tormented souls within. When fully charged, use this skill to compose the Requiem, transforming your Crossbow shot into a torrent of anguish for a short, fixed amount of time. Does not use Ammunition.
desc.变形为狼人，挥动利爪向前方投射一道新月状的月光寒冰弧线。: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and swipe with your claws, projecting an arc of moonlight and ice forward in a crescent.
desc.冰缓你在场范围内的所有敌人。: Chills all enemies in your Presence.
desc.变形为双足飞龙，吞噬一具灵柩或可被终结的敌人，并额外吞噬附近其他灵柩。每吞噬一个: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and devour a Corpse or Cullable enemy, and additional nearby Corpses. For each enemy or corpse devoured, you regenerate life and gain a Power Charge. If the target is far enough away, you will leap to them and damage nearby enemies where you land. Targeting nearby enemies or corpses will not perform a leap or a Slam.
desc.催生巨型藤蔓，在目标区域内随机破土而出。藤蔓将猛力砸向地面后缩回，并尽可能攻击附: Spur the growth of huge vines, which emerge randomly within the target area. The vines crash to the ground then retreat, targeting nearby enemies if possible.
desc.变形为狼人，将你的怒火献祭给月神以获得赐福，为你自身以及通过狼群或掠食者印记获得: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and offer your Rage to the moon to receive a blessing, gaining bonus Cold damage for yourself and any Wolf Minions you have from Wolf Pack or Predator's Mark. Spends all Rage to extend the Buff's duration. While the Buff is active, your Werewolf Melee Attacks call down Moonbeams on Hit.
desc.变形为狼人，发出凛冽嚎叫对敌人造成伤害，并冻结处于可被冻结状态的敌人。如果敌人被: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and let out an icy howl that damages enemies and Freezes Primed enemies. If an enemy is Frozen or a Frozen enemy is Hit, this Skill Empowers your attacks with added Cold damage, causes Empowered Slams to create Chilled Ground, and grants your Allies added Cold damage. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.
desc.传送到目标位置，造成闪电攻击伤害。: Teleport to a target, dealing Lightning Attack Damage.
desc.短暂延迟后爆炸，依据被击败的冻结敌人的生命在区域内造成冰霜伤害。: Explodes to deal Cold Damage in an area after a short delay, based on the life of the slain frozen Enemy.
desc.将敌人吸入并脉冲式释放闪电伤害，对被击中的敌人施加缓速效果。每次脉冲伤害逐次增强: Pull enemies in and pulse Lightning damage, Hindering enemies Hit. Each pulse increases in damage, with the final pulse dealing additional damage.
desc.根据消耗的点燃效果的预期伤害，在区域内造成一定比例的火焰伤害。: Deal Fire Damage in an Area based on a percentage of the expected Damage of the Consumed Ignite.
desc.使被辅助技能落地时产生多道裂缝。: Creates multiple Fissures when landing with Supported Skill.
desc.根据爆炸的灵柩生命上限，在其周围区域造成火焰伤害。\r\n: Deals Fire damage in an area around the exploding Corpse based on its maximum Life.
desc.从被辅助技能粉碎的物体中产生飞掠石召唤生物。: Creates Skittering Stone Minions from shattered objects created by Supported Skill.
desc.投掷一把烈焰之锤，猛击并嵌入地面。当锤子嵌在地面时，再次使用此技能会召回锤子并重: Hurl a fiery hammer that Slams into the ground and lodges there. While the hammer is lodged in the ground, reusing this Skill recalls the hammer and resets the Skill's cooldown. Alternatively, using a Warcry near the lodged hammer causes it to shatter, releasing a number of Molten Fissures in a spiral.
desc.激活时，当你的任何技能首次击中在场范围内的感电敌人时，该技能也会击中你在场范围内: While active, the first time any Skill Hits a Shocked enemy in your Presence, that Skill also Hits other Shocked enemies in your Presence, up to a maximum.
desc.消耗储存的召唤生物生命以复活你的召唤生物。最多复活生命总和不超过饕餮飨宴所储存的: Consume stored Minion Life to Revive your Minions. Revives as many Minions as possible with total maximum Life equal to or less than the Life stored by Grim Feast, prioritising those with higher maximum Life.
desc.强化你下一次使用的投射物技能，使其创造额外的投射物并飞行得更快。: Empowers the next Projectile Skill you use, causing it to create additional Projectiles and fly faster.
desc.召唤一个无法被攻击的暗光潜行者召唤生物，用邪恶幻象轰击敌人，缓速其移动。受到幻象: Summon an untargetable Lightless Stalker Minion which blasts enemies with malefic visions, Hindering their movement. Enemies that die while affected by the visions, or Rare and Unique enemies hit by you or your Minions, spawn Foul Eye Minions which last for a duration or until killed.
desc.在你周围的地面上产生剧毒花群区域。位于花群范围时，你的技能消耗提高，可以再生生命: Create an area of Toxic Bloom on the ground around you. While in the Bloom, you have increased Skill costs, Regenerate Life, and your Projectile Attacks attach a Toxic Pustule, which can be Poisoned. Pustules will Detonate after a duration or when enough Poison has been applied, dealing more damage based on the stored Poison damage and applying Poison in an area around it.
desc.激活时，当你对敌人施放法术时都会获得能量。积累一定的能量后再次使用该咒祈，即可消: While active, gains Energy when you cast Spells. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to trigger socketed Spells, and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough Energy.
desc.准备好你激活的弓类武器或战矛，强化你的下一个可重复的弓类武器或投射物类战矛的攻击: Ready your active Bow or Spear, Empowering your next Repeatable Bow or Projectile Spear Attacks to Convert Physical Damage to Cold Damage and Trigger Ice Fragments on Hit. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending a Frenzy Charge. Cannot Empower Sustained Skills.
desc.当你用徒手近战攻击击中时，召唤闪电箭对所有周围敌人造成徒手攻击伤害。: When you Hit with Unarmed Melee Attacks, calls down lightning bolts which deal Unarmed Attack damage to all surrounding enemies.
desc.当你使用徒手近战攻击击中时，会投射出冰寒霜风，对周围所有敌人造成徒手攻击伤害，并: When you Hit with Unarmed Melee Attacks, projects icy wind which deal Unarmed Attack damage to all surrounding enemies and destroy Ice Crystals.
desc.指示你的飞行伙伴撕碎另一名玩家的宠物。: Direct your flying companion to eviscerate another player's pet.
desc.辛格拉观察你未来的过去，给予你小幅颠覆命运的机会。经过一段事件的后见之明后，她会: Hinekora observes your Future-Past granting you the opportunity to subvert a lesser fate. After a period of Hindsight, she will grant you her Foresight, which prevents you from avoiding Hits while Dodge Rolling. When you are Hit while Dodge Rolling, Hinekora restores you to full Life immediately before taking damage from the Hit, and grants you Sight Beyond Sight, which prevents you from dying.
desc.持续吟唱为你的护甲注入符文嵌板。当你拥有这些符文嵌板并受到击中时，此技能会产生反: Channel to imbue your armour with Runic Plates. When you are Hit while you have these plates, some of the damage you would take will be prevented, and this skill will cause backlash, dealing your Thorns damage in an area around your attacker.
desc.当敌人进入区域时爆炸，并造成混沌伤害，击中时施加被辅助的诅咒。: Explodes and deals Chaos Damage when an Enemy enters the area, applying the supported Curse on Hit.
desc.命令一个魔侍冰霜法师以一个位置或召唤生物为目标，对区域内的召唤生物施加护甲，减少: Command a Skeletal Frost Mage to target a location or Minion and apply Ice Armour to Minions in an area, reducing damage taken from Hits, causing damage to enemies that Hit them, and counting as Frozen for other effects.
desc.激活时，当你冻结、感电或点燃目标时有几率产生一个灌注残片。: While active, has a chance to create an Infusion Remnant when you Freeze, Shock or Ignite a target.
desc.命令一个魔侍蛮兵使用战吼，威吓附近敌人并消耗敌人和友军身上的冻结，在其周围区域造: Command a Skeletal Brute to use a Warcry, Intimidating nearby enemies and Consuming Freeze on enemies and allies to deal damage in an Area around them.
desc.召唤多个冰霜投射物向目标发射。击中冰缓或冻结目标的投射物会产生冰块，撞击地面时造: Conjures a number of icy Projectiles that launch towards the target. Projectiles that Hit a Chilled or Frozen target create chunks of ice that deal additional damage on impacting the ground. Consumes a Cold Infusion if possible to cause each Projectile to lodge into the enemy then explode.
desc.一道闪电之弧从施法者射向目标敌人，并连锁到其他附近敌人。尽量消耗一次闪电灌注，造: An arc of Lightning stretches from the caster to a targeted enemy and Chains on to other nearby enemies. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to deal more damage and Chain further.
desc.召唤深渊之灵持续使一个稀有亡灵缓速。若你在该亡灵被缓速期间将其击败，它将被捕获并: Conjure Abyssal spirits to Hinder a Rare Undead for a duration. If you defeat the Undead while it is Hindered, it will be captured and stored into a Soul Crystal Skill Gem. The Soul Crystal will allow a wielder of great Abyssal power to summon the bound Undead as a Reviving Companion.
desc.召唤一个可复活的亡灵伙伴协助你作战。: Summon a Reviving Undead Companion to aid you in combat.
desc.当你施放一个伤害性的法术时，消耗一个暴击球触发一个深渊幻象，深渊幻象会和你施放同: Consume a Power Charge when you cast a damaging Spell to trigger an Abyssal Apparition who will also cast that same Spell for you. Does not work with Channelling Spells, Spells with a Cooldown, Triggered Spells, Spells granted by items, or Spells which already consume a Power Charge. This Skill is not directly Supportable.
desc.在被辅助技能创造的冰晶周围，生成蔓延的冰缓地面。: Creates spreading Chilled Ground around Ice Crystals created by Supported Skills.
desc.用你的断臂猛击其他流放者。: Whack another exile with your severed arm.
desc.激活时，你造成的物理攻击伤害的一部分会被存储。施放法术会消耗存储的伤害来创建一片: While active, a portion of the Physical Attack damage you deal is stored. Casting a Spell uses the stored damage to create a patch of Thorny Ground that deals Spell damage to moving enemies.
desc.激活时，你持续生成怒火。: While active, you constantly regenerate Rage.
desc.激活时，攻击敌人可积累狂怒值。使用此技能将释放狂怒，进入兽性狂乱状态，获得伤害加: While active, your Fury builds from Attacking enemies. Using this Skill releases your Fury to send you into a bestial frenzy, gaining damage and Onslaught but constantly losing life and forcing you into animal form. The frenzy ends immediately if you return to human form. You cannot gain Fury while in a frenzy.
desc.当掠食者印记激活时，此技能将被触发，召唤一只狼类召唤生物。只要该狼存活，它就会一: This skill is Triggered when Predator's Mark Activates to Summon a Wolf Minion that follows you as long as it lives.
desc.在怒火达到上限时继续获取怒火可积攒荣耀。当荣耀达到上限时，向天怒吼引动天罚攻击敌: Build Glory by gaining Rage while already at maximum Rage. When you have maximum Glory, roar to the heavens to bring them down upon your enemies. For the duration of the Skill, meteors rain down around you and you Gain Fire damage and Rage regeneration. This Skill's effects are suppressed if you leave Bear form, but will resume if you return to Bear form before the duration expires.
desc.利用你浩瀚的魔法力量牵引星辰本身，在你周围区域内反复触发星陨，若区域内无敌人可锁: Leash the stars themselves by leveraging your vast magical power, repeatedly Triggering Starfall targeting an enemy in an area around you, or a random location in that area if no enemies can be targeted.
desc.一颗星辰坠落在目标地点，撞击时造成范围伤害。较大的星辰会短暂留下冰缓地面。: A star falls at a targeted location, dealing area damage on impact. Larger stars leave Chilled Ground for a short duration.
desc.通过元素伤害击中敌人来积攒荣耀。当荣耀达到上限时，你可在一段时间内化身为行走的天: Build Glory by Hitting enemies with Elemental damage. When you have maximum Glory, you may become the walking Apocalypse for a duration, Triggering one of multiple powerful Elemental Skills at an interval while this Buff lasts.
desc.瞄准一个区域或敌人，召唤巨型陨石轰击目标区域，造成火焰伤害并加速敌人的灭亡。: Targets an area or an enemy, calling down a massive meteor to strike an area, dealing Fire damage and contributing to your enemies' extinction.
desc.瞄准一个区域或敌人，在持续时间内召唤一连串冷冽冰雹倾泻于目标区域。: Targets an area or an enemy, causing a series of icy hailstones to rain down in an area over a duration.
desc.瞄准一个区域或敌人，在目标地点引发急速积聚的闪电脉冲伤害，最终以一道强力的终结闪: Targets an area or an enemy, causing a rapid buildup of pulsing Lightning damage in an area that culminates in a powerful final Lightning strike.
desc.召唤一株翠绿的花朵，其将持续生长并爆炸。: Spawn a verdant flower that grows and explodes.
desc.在目标身后引发一道锥形火焰爆炸，造成攻击伤害。此伤害不基于你的武器。: Causes a fiery explosion in a cone behind the target, dealing Attack damage which is not based on your Weapon
desc.从感电敌人处，向附近被浸湿的敌人发射一枚连锁闪电投射物，造成法术伤害。: Sends a Chaining Lightning Projectile from the Shocked enemy towards a nearby Drenched enemy, dealing Spell damage.
desc.折射之镜会周期性在你在场时生成。使用法术投射物击中镜子会使其碎裂，并在破碎的镜子: Mirrors of Refraction appear in your Presence periodically. Hitting a mirror with a Spell Projectile causes it to shatter, copying the projectiles in a nova around the destroyed mirror. Copied Projectiles may be copied again when colliding with other mirrors.
desc.激活时，敌人的击中伤害若作用于你的能量护盾，将使你在短期内获得护甲。多次击中获得: While active, taking Hit damage from enemies to your Energy Shield causes you to gain Armour for a short duration. Armour gained from multiple Hits can stack. The total Armour gained from this Skill cannot exceed the Item Armour on your Equipped Armour Items.
desc.激活时，消耗魔力时可获得能量。当积攒了足够的能量后使用此召唤技能，将消耗能量来创: While active, gains Energy when you spend Mana. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to create visages which attack once with a socketed Shapeshifting Attack, creating multiple visages if it has enough Energy.
