desc.将一个剧毒芽孢附着在敌人身上，其将在短暂延迟后引爆，造成攻击伤害。芽孢也可被施加: Attach a Toxic Pustule to the enemy, which Detonates after a delay, dealing Attack damage. They can also be Poisoned, causing them to Detonate faster and more violently.
desc.向目标发起一次致命劈砍，造成攻击伤害。此伤害不基于你的武器。: Creates a deadly slash towards the target, dealing Attack damage which is not based on your Weapon
desc.通过对敌人造成混沌伤害来积累荣耀。当你拥有满荣耀时，可以祈求幻梦者附身于你，短暂: Build Glory by dealing Chaos damage to enemies. When you have maximum Glory, you can entreat the Dreamer to inhabit you, briefly becoming his Archon.
desc.你被阿兹莫里万灵选中，它们指引着你，使你能够看见附近的远古之花。: You are chosen by Azmerian spirits who provide guidance, allowing you to see nearby Ancient Blooms.
desc.挥动神圣之翼跃入空中，以长矛重击落地处的敌人。若你附近或目标位置存在神圣碎片，此: Leap into the air carried by divine wings, damaging enemies with your spear where you land. If there is a Fragment of Divinity near you or the targeted location, this attack will Consume it when you leap to become Empowered, dealing more damage and granting life and mana recovery. This skill does not use up its Cooldown when empowered.
desc.通过冰冻或冰缓敌人来积攒荣耀。后跃并将锤类武器奋力掷出，锤类武器会在抵达目标地点: Build up Glory by Freezing or Chilling enemies. When you have maximum Glory you may jump backwards loosing your Mace with the force of a falling comet onto your target. The impact releases Fissures and causes stars to fall in the area for a brief period.
desc.激活状态下，当你击杀受到元素异常状态影响的敌人，或击中受到元素异常状态影响的稀有: While active, summons short-lived Azmerian Swarms when you kill enemies affected by Elemental Ailments or hit Rare or Unique enemies affected by Elemental Ailments. The swarms are untargetable Minions that pursue nearby enemies to Attack them and infict Faerie Fire on Hit.
desc.从你击杀的敌人以及你击中的稀有或传奇敌人身上，汲取其潜藏的恐惧，将其转化为不稳定: Draws out the latent fears of enemies you kill and Rare or Unique enemies you Hit, turning them into unstable apparitions which charge towards enemies and then explode.
desc.召唤鸟群伤害周围的敌人。: The Flock damages enemies around you.
desc.将你的盾牌作为投射物掷出，飞行结束后会返回你身边。在盾牌处于飞行状态时，此技能会: Hurl your Shield as a Projectile which Returns to you at the end of its flight. While the Shield is in flight, this skill is replaced with Embrace the Fall. This skill's cooldown is skipped if you catch the Shield as it Returns, or destroy an Ice Crystal with the Embrace the Fall.
desc.传送至你掷出的盾牌处，凌空现身并向下猛击地面，造成范围伤害。用此技能摧毁一个冰晶: Teleport to your thrown Shield, appearing in the air and Slamming it into the ground to deal damage in an area. Destroying an Ice Crystal with this skill skips the cooldown of Soaring Midnight.
desc.召唤一个混沌龙卷风，追踪并减速敌人。: Conjure a Chaos tornado that chases down and Slows enemies.
desc.召唤一个会变形的灵魂容器伙伴，它会复制并使用已镶嵌的巨熊、狼人和双足飞龙技能。: Summons a Shapeshifting Spirit Vessel Companion that uses copies of socketed Bear, Werewolf, and Wyvern Skills.
desc.命令你的猫咪伙伴去魅惑另一名玩家的宠物。: Direct your feline companion to mesmerize another player's pet.
desc.向一名敌人冲刺并发起打击，若其生命值过低则直接将其终结。当此技能击杀敌人时，你会: Dash to an enemy and Strike them, Culling enemies if their life is low enough. When this skill kills an enemy you draw out their final fears, crushing them to create a shockwave. Enemies around you that can be Culled will be highlighted.
desc.激活时，使用其他技能造成暴击击中造成击杀，或击中强大目标，你将获得极寒花瓣。积聚: While active, Critical Hits with other skills that kill targets, or hit powerful targets cause you to gain Arctic Petals. Once you have enough Arctic Petals they will be Consumed to create Ice Crystals near the most recent target.
desc.激活时，召唤一面闪烁的屏障，随时间积累每种属性类型的保护性宝石尘埃，但当你被击中: While active, conjures a glittering barrier that accumulates protective gemstone Motes of each Attribute type over time, but loses a random Mote when you are Hit.
desc.引爆一只女巫蟾蜍，造成范围法术伤害。: Explodes a Witchtoad to deal spell damage in an area.
desc.激活时，会揭示你附近强烈的符文能量区域。站立其上可让你获得强大的法术伤害加成，但: While active, areas of intense runic energy are revealed to you. Standing over them grants you a powerful Spell damage boost but constantly drains your Runic Ward. Running out of Runic Ward causes the energy to temporarily dissipate.
desc.释放一波不稳定的冰霜，以火焰为食。此波动本身不造成伤害，但冰霜会附着于点燃的敌人: Unleash a wave of volatile ice that feeds on flames. While the wave doesn't deal damage, the ice latches onto Ignited enemies, refreshing the duration of their active Ignite and rapidly Freezing them but preventing them from being Ignited further until the Ignite expires.
desc.献祭你的符文结界，释放一道能量脉冲，为附近的友军提供防卫。: Sacrifice your Runic Ward to send out an energy pulse that grants nearby Allies Guard.
desc.从被击中的敌人身上发射熔融投射物，投射物落在附近时会爆炸，对范围内造成攻击伤害。: Fires molten Projectiles from the enemy hit, which will explode when they land nearby, dealing Attack damage in an area.
desc.消耗符文结界以生成维金灌注，该灌注可用于替代任意元素灌注。: Spends Ward to generate Verisium Infusions, which can be used in place of any Elemental Infusions.
desc.消耗所有符文结界以获得一个短时增益状态，使你能够格挡所有可格挡的击中，并对你已格: Spends all your Ward to gain a short-duration Buff that causes you to Block all Blockable Hits and apply Parried to enemies from which you've Blocked a Hit. This Buff is removed if you are Heavy Stunned. While this Buff is active, you cannot be Light Stunned, but Blocking too much damage may Heavy Stun you.
desc.选定一片区域，用维金符文诅咒其中的敌人，使其陷入脆弱。击中这些敌人会使诅咒触发一: Target an area and Curse enemies within with a Verisium Rune, inflicting them with Fragility. Hitting these enemies causes the Curse to Trigger an explosion to deal damage in an area and apply significant Knockback to other enemies near the Cursed target, with more Stun buildup based on the Fragility on the target Hit.
desc.对被诅咒目标周围的区域造成物理攻击伤害，此伤害不基于你的武器伤害。其他目标将被击: Deals Physical Attack damage in an area around the Cursed target that is not based on your Weapon's damage. Other targets are Knocked back and take more Stun buildup based on the Fragility they have.
desc.借助三耀之火的力量，强化你下次施放的可扩散法术。该强化的法术将以你的位置为中心，: Tap into the power of the Triskelion Flame to Empower the next Cascadable Spell you cast. The Empowered Spell becomes centred on your location, and Cascades to six areas around you in a Triskelion pattern.
desc.交换冲突摇篮当前的主导形态。: {DNT] Swap the currently dominant form of the Cradle of Conflict.
desc.通过消耗符文结界来积攒荣耀。当你拥有满荣耀时，可以从天空召唤大量维金，对目标地点: Build Glory by spending Runic Ward. When you have maximum Glory, you may call down a mass of Verisium from the sky, dealing high damage at the targeted location and summoning a Temporary Minion. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast. Consumes a Verisium Infusion, if possible, to increase the number of Minions summoned .
desc.击中一名处于终结阈值以下的敌人，会使其猛烈爆炸，伤害周围的敌人。高亮显示处于终结: Hit an enemy under the Culling Strike Threshold, causing them to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies. Highlights enemies under the Culling Strike Threshold.
desc.牺牲部分生命以回复符文结界。该技能回复的符文结界可以溢出。: Sacrifice a portion of your Life to recover Runic Ward. Runic Ward recovered by this Skill can Overflow.
desc.消耗符文结界并选定一片区域，将灵柩转化为苦痛核心，这些核心会追踪敌人并冰缓其附近: Spend Ward and target an area, transforming Corpses into bitter cores that seek out enemies and Chill enemies near them. The cores explode at the end of their duration, creating runes which deal additional Cold damage over time.
desc.消耗符文结界以立即复活你的召唤生物。优先复活最强大的召唤物。: Spend Runic Ward to instantly Revive your Minions. Prioritises the most powerful minions first.
desc.消耗符文结界，在你的周围地面引发具有伤害的冰晶长矛。这些长矛可被摧毁，被摧毁时会: Spend Runic Ward to cause damaging Ice-Crystal spears to erupt from the ground around you. These spears can be destroyed for an explosion of Cold damage.
desc.激活时，使用攻击造成击中会消耗符文结界，召唤一个维金化形——一种临时召唤生物，会: While active, Hitting with an Attack will spend Runic Ward to summon a Verisium Manifestation, a short-lived Temporary Minion that rapidly Attacks nearby enemies, ignoring commands. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them.
desc.召唤一个短暂的维金化形，向敌人发起投射物攻击。: Summon a short-lived Verisium Manifestation that launches Projectile Attacks at enemies.
desc.激活时，你晕眩或击杀的敌人有几率生成一个符文结界残片。这些残片可使你的符文结界溢: While active, enemies you Stun or kill have a chance to generate a Runic Ward Remnant. These Remnants can Overflow your Runic Ward.
desc.消耗所有符文结界来召唤临时结界施法者。这些召唤生物会以伤害性冰霜法术对付附近的敌: Spend all your Runic Ward to summon Temporary Wardbound Casters. These Minions target nearby enemies with damaging Cold Spells.
desc.消耗符文结界以创造一座维金火山，在初次喷发时造成伤害并触发冰霜碎片。: Spend Runic Ward to create a Verisium volcano that deals damage on initial eruption and Triggers Ice Fragments.
desc.消耗符文结界在你前方的锥形区域内创造数个危险性符文，这些符文会在一段时间后武装。: Spend Runic Ward to create a number of Hazardous Runes in a cone in front of you, which arm after a time. After arming, these Runes will activate when enemies step on them, exploding to deal Attack damage that is not based on your Weapon's damage and apply Electrocution buildup.
desc.以失血击杀敌人会引发鲜血爆炸，对周围敌人造成物理 攻击伤害。此伤害不基于你的武器: Killing an enemy with Blood Loss will cause a bloody explosion that deals Physical Attack damage to surrounding enemies. This damage is not based on your Weapon Damage, but is based on their accumulated Blood Loss. The explosion destroys their Corpse if the enemy was Normal or Magic.
desc.消耗大量符文结界，立即创造一个短暂的自身复制体。该复制体会使用一次已镶嵌的技能，: Expend a large amount of Runic Ward to instantly create a short-lived copy of yourself that uses a Socketed Skill once, then vanishes. This Skill's cost is equal to the total cost of Socketed Skills. The copy cannot perform Channelled, Remote, Cooldown or Conditional Skills, or summon Minions.
desc.持续吟唱以在你周围创造一个保护性泡泡，格挡针对你的击中。持续吟唱此技能时，你不会: Channel to create a protective bubble all around you, Blocking Hits against you. While Channelling this Skill, you cannot be Light Stunned by Hits you Block, and damage you take from Hits is also removed from Runic Ward. Blocking Hits this way causes you to accumulate Heavy Stun buildup. You cannot recover Runic Ward while this Skill is active.
desc.在你面前升起一对电塔，在两者之间投射出一道电力之墙，伤害并使被困其中的敌人触电。: Raise a pair of electrified pylons in front of you which project a wall of electricity between them, damaging and Electrocuting enemies caught between them. Projectiles you fire through the wall become energised, and discharge that energy on Hit as Chaining Lightning beams.
desc.创造一个自身的破碎拟像，在施放触发类法术时将其定住。若达到破碎拟像的数量上限，它: Creates a Fractured Mimic of yourself, suspended in time at the point of casting the Triggering Spell. If you reach the Limit of Fractured Mimics, they will all finish casting their Spells and disappear.
desc.激活时，拾取残片会触发一次致命爆炸，在残片所在位置造成伤害，伤害类型基于所拾取残: While active, picking up Remnants Triggers a deadly explosion, dealing damage at the location of the Remnant based on the type of Remnant picked up.
desc.将你的符文结界灌注于召唤的刀刃。在增益状态持续期间，这些刀刃会落在被你的投射物攻: Pour your Runic Ward into conjuring blades. For the duration of the Buff, these blades fall on enemies Hit by your Projectile Attacks.
desc.足以重度晕眩敌人的攻击会在其周围区域内产生回荡，并造成大幅的护甲破损。: Blows strong enough to Heavy Stun an enemy reverberate in an area around the enemy and heavily Break Armour.
desc.激活后，奔跑会使你化做一群蝗虫，在你周围区域造成物理攻击伤害，此伤害不基于你的武: While active, Sprinting turns you into a locust swarm which deals Physical Attack damage, which is not based on your Weapon's damage, in an area around you. You take damage and gain Heavy Stun buildup if this Hits any targets, but damage you take from other sources while sprinting will not apply Heavy Stun or interrupt your sprinting.
